import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from datetime import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String(50), unique=True, nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = Column(String(255), nullable=False)  # Store hashed passwords
    first_name = Column(String(50))
    last_name = Column(String(50))
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="user")
    addresses = relationship("Address", back_populates="user")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<User(username='{self.username}', email='{self.email}')>"

class Address(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'addresses'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'), nullable=False)
    street_address = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    city = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    state = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    zip_code = Column(String(20), nullable=False)
    country = Column(String(50), nullable=False)

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="addresses")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Address(street='{self.street_address}', city='{self.city}')>"

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), unique=True, nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'), nullable=False)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(2000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    image_url = Column(String(255))
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'), nullable=False)
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    total_amount = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    status = Column(String(50), default='Pending')  # e.g., Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled
    shipping_address_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('addresses.id')) #Optional shipping address
    billing_address_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('addresses.id')) #Optional billing address

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, user_id={self.user_id}, total={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'), nullable=False)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'), nullable=False)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"

class Review(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'reviews'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'), nullable=False)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'), nullable=False)
    rating = Column(Integer, nullable=False) # 1-5 stars
    comment = Column(String(2000))
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

    product = relationship("Product")
    user = relationship("User")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Review(product_id={self.product_id}, rating={self.rating})>"

    db_category = db.query(Category).filter(Category.id == category_id).first()
    if db_category:
        if name:
            db_category.name = name
        if description:
            db_category.description = description
        db.commit()
        db.refresh(db_category)
        return db_category
    return None

def delete_category(db: SessionLocal, category_id: int):
    db_category = db.query(Category).filter(Category.id == category_id).first()
    if db_category:
        db.delete(db_category)
        db.commit()
        return True
    return False

def create_product(db: SessionLocal, category_id: int, name: str, description: str, price: float, image_url: str, stock_quantity: int):
    db_product = Product(category_id=category_id, name=name, description=description, price=price, image_url=image_url, stock_quantity=stock_quantity)
    db.add(db_product)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(db_product)
    return db_product

def get_product(db: SessionLocal, product_id: int):
    return db.query(Product).filter(Product.id == product_id).first()

def update_product(db: SessionLocal, product_id: int, name: str = None, description: str = None, price: float = None, image_url: str = None, stock_quantity: int = None):
    db_product = db.query(Product).filter(Product.id == product_id).first()
    if db_product:

        if description:

        if price:

        if image_url:

        if stock_quantity:

        db.commit()
        db.refresh(db_product)
        return db_product
    return None

def delete_product(db: SessionLocal, product_id: int):
    db_product = db.query(Product).filter(Product.id == product_id).first()
    if db_product:
        db.delete(db_product)
        db.commit()
        return True
    return False

# Example Usage (Illustrative - requires a running database)
if __name__ == "__main__":
    # Create a database session
    db_generator = get_db()
    db = next(db_generator)

    # Example: Create a category
    new_category = create_category(db, name="Mountain Bikes", description="Bikes for off-road adventures")

    # Close the database session (implicitly done by the generator)

    return db.query(Product).filter(Product.name.contains(query) | Product.description.contains(query)).all()

def create_order(db: SessionLocal, user_id: int):
    db_order = Order(user_id=user_id)
    db.add(db_order)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(db_order)
    return db_order

def get_order(db: SessionLocal, order_id: int):
    return db.query(Order).filter(Order.id == order_id).first()

def update_order_status(db: SessionLocal, order_id: int, status: str):
    db_order = db.query(Order).filter(Order.id == order_id).first()
    if db_order:
        db_order.status = status
        db.commit()
        db.refresh(db_order)
    return db_order

def create_order_item(db: SessionLocal, order_id: int, product_id: int, quantity: int, price: float):
    db_order_item = OrderItem(order_id=order_id, product_id=product_id, quantity=quantity, price=price)
    db.add(db_order_item)
    db.commit()
    return db_order_item

def calculate_total_amount(db: SessionLocal, order_id: int):
    order = db.query(Order).filter(Order.id == order_id).first()
    if not order:
        return None

    total_amount = 0
    for item in order.order_items:
        total_amount += item.quantity * item.price

    order.total_amount = total_amount
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(order)
    return total_amount

# Example Usage (Illustrative - requires a running database)
if __name__ == "__main__":
    db = next(get_db()) # Get a database session

    # Create a user
    new_user = create_user(db, username="testuser", email="test@example.com", password="password123", first_name="Test", last_name="User")
    print(f"Created user: {new_user}")

    # Create a category
    new_category = create_category(db, name="Bikes", description="Complete bicycles")
    print(f"Created category: {new_category}")

    # Create a product
    new_product = create_product(db, name="Mountain Bike", description="A great mountain bike", price=500.00, stock_quantity=10, category_id=new_category.id)
    print(f"Created product: {new_product}")

    # Search for products
    search_results = search_products(db, "mountain")
    print(f"Search results: {search_results}")

    # Create an order
    new_order = create_order(db, user_id=new_user.id)
    print(f"Created order: {new_order}")

    # Add an item to the order
    create_order_item(db, order_id=new_order.id, product_id=new_product.id, quantity=1, price=new_product.price)

    # Calculate the total amount of the order
    total = calculate_total_amount(db, new_order.id)
    print(f"Total amount for order {new_order.id}: {total}")

    # Update product stock
    updated_product = update_product(db, new_product.id, stock_quantity=5)

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from datetime import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String(50), unique=True, nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = Column(String(255), nullable=False)  # Store hashed passwords
    first_name = Column(String(50))
    last_name = Column(String(50))
    address = Column(String(255))
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    is_admin = Column(Boolean, default=False)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="user")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<User(username='{self.username}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(50), unique=True, nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"


class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    image_url = Column(String(255))
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'))

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'), nullable=False)
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    total_amount = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    status = Column(String(50), default='Pending')  # e.g., Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, user_id={self.user_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'), nullable=False)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'), nullable=False)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"


# Database connection
DATABASE_URL = "sqlite:///./bicycle_shop.db"  # Use SQLite for simplicity; change for production
engine = create_engine(DATABASE_URL)
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

# Session creation
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)

def get_db():
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()

# Example usage (CRUD operations)
def create_database_entries():
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        # Create categories
        category_bikes = Category(name="Bikes", description="Complete bicycles")
        category_parts = Category(name="Parts", description="Spare parts for bicycles")
        category_accessories = Category(name="Accessories", description="Bicycle accessories")
        db.add_all([category_bikes, category_parts, category_accessories])
        db.commit()

        # Create products
        product_bike1 = Product(name="Mountain Bike", description="Full suspension mountain bike", price=1200.00, stock_quantity=10, category_id=category_bikes.id)
        product_tire = Product(name="Tire 26x2.1", description="Off-road tire", price=35.00, stock_quantity=50, category_id=category_parts.id)
        product_helmet = Product(name="Helmet", description="Adult helmet", price=45.00, stock_quantity=30, category_id=category_accessories.id)
        db.add_all([product_bike1, product_tire, product_helmet])
        db.commit()

        # Create a user
        user1 = User(username="john_doe", email="john.doe@example.com", password="hashed_password", first_name="John", last_name="Doe")
        db.add(user1)
        db.commit()

        # Create an order
        order1 = Order(user_id=user1.id)
        db.add(order1)
        db.commit()

        # Create order items
        order_item1 = OrderItem(order_id=order1.id, product_id=product_bike1.id, quantity=1, price=product_bike1.price)
        order_item2 = OrderItem(order_id=order1.id, product_id=product_helmet.id, quantity=2, price=product_helmet.price)
        db.add_all([order_item1, order_item2])
        db.commit()

        # Update order total
        order1.total_amount = (order_item1.quantity * order_item1.price) + (order_item2.quantity * order_item2.price)
        db.commit()

        print("Database entries created successfully.")

    except Exception as e:
        db.rollback()
        print(f"Error creating database entries: {e}")
    finally:
        db.close()

def perform_crud_operations():
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        # Create (already done in create_database_entries, but showing example)
        new_category = Category(name="Clothing", description="Bicycle clothing")
        db.add(new_category)
        db.commit()

        # Read
        category = db.query(Category).filter(Category.name == "Bikes").first()
        if category:
            print(f"Category found: {category}")

        # Update
        if category:
            category.description = "Complete bicycles for all terrains"
            db.commit()
            print("Category updated successfully.")

        # Delete
        category_to_delete = db.query(Category).filter(Category.name == "Clothing").first()
        if category_to_delete:
            db.delete(category_to_delete)
            db.commit()
            print("Category deleted successfully.")

        # Filter and Search
        products = db.query(Product).filter(Product.price > 50).all()
        print("Products with price > 50:")
        for product in products:
            print(product)

        search_term = "bike"
        search_results = db.query(Product).filter(Product.name.ilike(f"%{search_term}%")).all() # ilike for case-insensitive search
        print(f"Search results for '{search_term}':")
        for product in search_results:
            print(product)

    except Exception as e:
        db.rollback()
        print(f"Error performing CRUD operations: {e}")
    finally:
        db.close()

if __name__ == '__main__':
    create_database_entries()
    perform_crud_operations()

class Category(Base):

# Database connection
DATABASE_URL = "sqlite:///./bicycle_shop.db"  # Use SQLite for simplicity; change for other databases
engine = create_engine(DATABASE_URL)
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

# Session creation
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)

def get_db():
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()


# Example CRUD operations (using a dependency injection pattern for the database session)

def create_user(db: SessionLocal, username, email, password, first_name=None, last_name=None):
    db_user = User(username=username, email=email, password=password, first_name=first_name, last_name=last_name)
    db.add(db_user)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(db_user)
    return db_user

def get_user(db: SessionLocal, user_id: int):
    return db.query(User).filter(User.id == user_id).first()

def get_user_by_username(db: SessionLocal, username: str):
    return db.query(User).filter(User.username == username).first()

def update_user(db: SessionLocal, user_id: int, username=None, email=None, first_name=None, last_name=None):
    db_user = db.query(User).filter(User.id == user_id).first()
    if db_user:
        if username:
            db_user.username = username
        if email:
            db_user.email = email
        if first_name:
            db_user.first_name = first_name
        if last_name:
            db_user.last_name = last_name
        db.commit()
        db.refresh(db_user)
    return db_user

def delete_user(db: SessionLocal, user_id: int):
    db_user = db.query(User).filter(User.id == user_id).first()
    if db_user:
        db.delete(db_user)
        db.commit()
        return True
    return False

    db_category = Category(name=name, description=description)
    db.add(db_category)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(db_category)
    return db_category

def get_category(db: SessionLocal, category_id: int):
    return db.query(Category).filter(Category.id == category_id).first()

def update_category(db: SessionLocal, category_id: int, name: str = None, description: str = None):
    db_category = db.query(Category).filter(Category.id == category_id).first()
    if db_category:
        if name:
            db_category.name = name
        if description:
            db_category.description = description
        db.commit()
        db.refresh(db_category)
    return db_category

def delete_category(db: SessionLocal, category_id: int):
    db_category = db.query(Category).filter(Category.id == category_id).first()
    if db_category:
        db.delete(db_category)
        db.commit()
        return True
    return False

def create_product(db: SessionLocal, name: str, description: str, price: float, stock_quantity: int, category_id: int, image_url: str = None):
    db_product = Product(name=name, description=description, price=price, stock_quantity=stock_quantity, category_id=category_id, image_url=image_url)
    db.add(db_product)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(db_product)
    return db_product

def get_product(db: SessionLocal, product_id: int):
    return db.query(Product).filter(Product.id == product_id).first()

def update_product(db: SessionLocal, product_id: int, name: str = None, description: str = None, price: float = None, stock_quantity: int = None, category_id: int = None, image_url: str = None):
    db_product = db.query(Product).filter(Product.id == product_id).first()
    if db_product:
        if name:
            db_product.name = name
        if description:
            db_product.description = description
        if price:
            db_product.price = price
        if stock_quantity:
            db_product.stock_quantity = stock_quantity
        if category_id:
            db_product.category_id = category_id
        if image_url:
            db_product.image_url = image_url
        db.commit()
        db.refresh(db_product)
    return db_product

def delete_product(db: SessionLocal, product_id: int):
    db_product = db.query(Product).filter(Product.id == product_id).first()
    if db_product:
        db.delete(db_product)
        db.commit()
        return True
    return False

def list_products(db: SessionLocal, skip: int = 0, limit: int = 100):
    return db.query(Product).offset(skip).limit(limit).all()

def search_products(db: SessionLocal, query: str):
    return db.query(Product).filter(Product.name.contains(query) | Product.description.contains(query)).all()

def create_order(db: SessionLocal, user_id: int):
    db_order = Order(user_id=user_id)
    db.add(db_order)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(db_order)
    return db_order

def get_order(db: SessionLocal, order_id: int):
    return db.query(Order).filter(Order.id == order_id).first()

def update_order_status(db: SessionLocal, order_id: int, status: str):

    if db_order:
        db_order.status = status
        db.commit()

def create_order_item(db: SessionLocal, order_id: int, product_id: int, quantity: int, price: float):

    db.add(db_order_item)

def calculate_total_amount(db: SessionLocal, order_id: int):
    order = db.query(Order).filter(Order.id == order_id).first()
    if not order:

    total_amount = 0
    for item in order.order_items:

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from datetime import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String(50), unique=True, nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = Column(String(255), nullable=False)  # Store hashed passwords
    first_name = Column(String(50))
    last_name = Column(String(50))
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="user")
    addresses = relationship("Address", back_populates="user")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<User(username='{self.username}', email='{self.email}')>"

class Address(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'addresses'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'), nullable=False)
    street_address = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    city = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    state = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    zip_code = Column(String(20), nullable=False)
    country = Column(String(50), nullable_False)

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="addresses")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Address(street='{self.street_address}', city='{self.city}')>"

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), unique=True, nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'), nullable=False)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    image_url = Column(String(255))
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'), nullable=False)
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    total_amount = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    status = Column(String(50), default='Pending')  # e.g., Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled
    shipping_address_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('addresses.id')) #Optional shipping address
    billing_address_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('addresses.id')) #Optional billing address

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(order_date='{self.order_date}', total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'), nullable=False)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'), nullable=False)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"

class Review(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'reviews'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'), nullable=False)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'), nullable=False)
    rating = Column(Integer, nullable=False) #Scale of 1-5
    comment = Column(String(255))
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

    product = relationship("Product")
    user = relationship("User")

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Mountain", "Road", "Hybrid"
    frame_material = Column(String)
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    color = Column(String)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', brand='{self.brand}', model='{self.model}', price={self.price})>"


class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Brakes", "Gears", "Tires"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    compatible_bicycles = Column(String, nullable=True) # List of compatible bicycle models, comma separated

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="spare_part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<SparePart(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Helmets", "Lights", "Locks"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    size = Column(String, nullable=True)
    color = Column(String, nullable=True)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String)
    phone_number = Column(String)
    address = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    status = Column(String, default="Pending")  # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date='{self.order_date}', total_amount={self.total_amount}, status='{self.status}')>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    price = Column(Float)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="order_items")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart", back_populates="order_items")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        item_type = "Bicycle" if self.bicycle_id else "SparePart" if self.spare_part_id else "Accessory"
        item_id = self.bicycle_id or self.spare_part_id or self.accessory_id
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, {item_type}_id={item_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"


def create_database(db_url):
    """Creates the database and tables."""
    engine = create_engine(db_url)
    Base.metadata.create_all(engine)
    return engine


def create_session(engine):
    """Creates a database session."""
    Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
    return Session()


def add_bicycle(session, name, brand, model, description, price, quantity_in_stock, category, frame_material, wheel_size, color):
    """Adds a new bicycle to the database."""
    bicycle = Bicycle(name=name, brand=brand, model=model, description=description, price=price,
                       quantity_in_stock=quantity_in_stock, category=category, frame_material=frame_material,
                       wheel_size=wheel_size, color=color)
    session.add(bicycle)
    session.commit()
    return bicycle


def add_spare_part(session, name, description, price, quantity_in_stock, category, brand, model, compatible_bicycles):
    """Adds a new spare part to the database."""
    spare_part = SparePart(name=name, description=description, price=price,
                           quantity_in_stock=quantity_in_stock, category=category, brand=brand,
                           model=model, compatible_bicycles=compatible_bicycles)
    session.add(spare_part)
    session.commit()
    return spare_part


def add_accessory(session, name, description, price, quantity_in_stock, category, brand, model, size, color):
    """Adds a new accessory to the database."""
    accessory = Accessory(name=name, description=description, price=price,
                         quantity_in_stock=quantity_in_stock, category=category, brand=brand,
                         model=model, size=size, color=color)
    session.add(accessory)
    session.commit()
    return accessory


def add_customer(session, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number, address):
    """Adds a new customer to the database."""
    customer = Customer(first_name=first_name, last_name=last_name, email=email,
                        phone_number=phone_number, address=address)
    session.add(customer)
    session.commit()
    return customer


def create_order(session, customer_id):
    """Creates a new order for a customer."""
    customer = session.query(Customer).get(customer_id)
    if not customer:
        raise ValueError("Customer not found")

    order = Order(customer_id=customer_id)
    session.add(order)
    session.commit()
    return order


def add_item_to_order(session, order_id, item_type, item_id, quantity):
    """Adds an item (bicycle, spare part, or accessory) to an order."""
    order = session.query(Order).get(order_id)
    if not order:
        raise ValueError("Order not found")

    if item_type == "bicycle":
        item = session.query(Bicycle).get(item_id)
    elif item_type == "spare_part":
        item = session.query(SparePart).get(item_id)
    elif item_type == "accessory":
        item = session.query(Accessory).get(item_id)
    else:
        raise ValueError("Invalid item type")

    if not item:
        raise ValueError(f"{item_type.capitalize()} not found")

    if item.quantity_in_stock < quantity:
        raise ValueError("Not enough items in stock")

    order_item = OrderItem(order_id=order_id, quantity=quantity, price=item.price)

    if item_type == "bicycle":
        order_item.bicycle_id = item_id
    elif item_type == "spare_part":
        order_item.spare_part_id = item_id
    elif item_type == "accessory":
        order_item.accessory_id = item_id

    session.add(order_item)
    item.quantity_in_stock -= quantity
    order.total_amount = (order.total_amount or 0) + (item.price * quantity)

    session.commit()
    return order_item


def update_bicycle(session, bicycle_id, name=None, brand=None, model=None, description=None, price=None, quantity_in_stock=None, category=None, frame_material=None, wheel_size=None, color=None):
    """Updates the details of a bicycle."""
    bicycle = session.query(Bicycle).get(bicycle_id)
    if not bicycle:
        raise ValueError("Bicycle not found")

    if name:
        bicycle.name = name
    if brand:
        bicycle.brand = brand
    if model:
        bicycle.model = model
    if description:
        bicycle.description = description
    if price:
        bicycle.price = price
    if quantity_in_stock:
        bicycle.quantity_in_stock = quantity_in_stock
    if category:
        bicycle.category = category
    if frame_material:
        bicycle.frame_material = frame_material
    if wheel_size:
        bicycle.wheel_size = wheel_size
    if color:
        bicycle.color = color

    session.commit()
    return bicycle


def update_spare_part(session, spare_part_id, name=None, description=None, price=None, quantity_in_stock=None, category=None, brand=None, model=None, compatible_bicycles=None):
    """Updates the details of a spare part."""
    spare_part = session.query(SparePart).get(spare_part_id)
    if not spare_part:
        raise ValueError("Spare part not found")

    if name:
        spare_part.name = name
    if description:

    if price:

    if quantity_in_stock:

    if category:

    if brand:
        spare_part.brand = brand
    if model:
        spare_part.model = model
    if compatible_bicycles:
        spare_part.compatible_bicycles = compatible_bicycles

    session.commit()
    return spare_part


def update_accessory(session, accessory_id, name=None, description=None, price=None, quantity_in_stock=None, category=None, brand=None, model=None, size=None, color=None):
    """Updates the details of an accessory."""
    accessory = session.query(Accessory).get(accessory_id)
    if not accessory:
        raise ValueError("Accessory not found")

    if name:

    if description:

    if price:

    if category:

    if brand:

    if model:
        accessory.model = model
    if size:
        accessory.size = size
    if color:
        accessory.color = color

    session.commit()
    return accessory


def delete_bicycle(session, bicycle_id):
    """Deletes a bicycle from the database."""
    bicycle = session.query(Bicycle).get(bicycle_id)

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Mountain", "Road", "Hybrid"
    frame_material = Column(String)
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    color = Column(String)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', brand='{self.brand}', model='{self.model}', price={self.price})>"


class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Brakes", "Gears", "Tires"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    compatible_bicycles = Column(String, nullable=True) # List of compatible bicycle models, comma separated

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="spare_part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<SparePart(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Helmets", "Lights", "Locks"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    size = Column(String, nullable=True)
    color = Column(String, nullable=True)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String)
    phone_number = Column(String)
    address = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    status = Column(String, default="Pending")  # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date='{self.order_date}', total_amount={self.total_amount}, status='{self.status}')>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    price = Column(Float)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="order_items")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart", back_populates="order_items")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        item_type = "Bicycle" if self.bicycle_id else "SparePart" if self.spare_part_id else "Accessory"
        item_id = self.bicycle_id or self.spare_part_id or self.accessory_id
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, {item_type}_id={item_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"


def create_database(db_url):
    """Creates the database and tables."""
    engine = create_engine(db_url)
    Base.metadata.create_all(engine)
    return engine


def create_session(engine):
    """Creates a database session."""
    Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
    return Session()


def add_bicycle(session, name, brand, model, description, price, quantity_in_stock, category, frame_material, wheel_size, color):
    """Adds a new bicycle to the database."""
    bicycle = Bicycle(name=name, brand=brand, model=model, description=description, price=price,
                       quantity_in_stock=quantity_in_stock, category=category, frame_material=frame_material,
                       wheel_size=wheel_size, color=color)
    session.add(bicycle)
    session.commit()
    return bicycle


def add_spare_part(session, name, description, price, quantity_in_stock, category, brand, model, compatible_bicycles):
    """Adds a new spare part to the database."""
    spare_part = SparePart(name=name, description=description, price=price,
                           quantity_in_stock=quantity_in_stock, category=category, brand=brand,
                           model=model, compatible_bicycles=compatible_bicycles)
    session.add(spare_part)
    session.commit()
    return spare_part


def add_accessory(session, name, description, price, quantity_in_stock, category, brand, model, size, color):
    """Adds a new accessory to the database."""
    accessory = Accessory(name=name, description=description, price=price,
                         quantity_in_stock=quantity_in_stock, category=category, brand=brand,
                         model=model, size=size, color=color)
    session.add(accessory)
    session.commit()
    return accessory


def add_customer(session, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number, address):
    """Adds a new customer to the database."""
    customer = Customer(first_name=first_name, last_name=last_name, email=email,
                        phone_number=phone_number, address=address)
    session.add(customer)
    session.commit()
    return customer


def create_order(session, customer_id):
    """Creates a new order for a customer."""
    customer = session.query(Customer).get(customer_id)
    if not customer:
        raise ValueError("Customer not found")

    order = Order(customer_id=customer_id)
    session.add(order)
    session.commit()
    return order


def add_item_to_order(session, order_id, item_type, item_id, quantity):
    """Adds an item (bicycle, spare part, or accessory) to an order."""
    order = session.query(Order).get(order_id)
    if not order:
        raise ValueError("Order not found")

    if item_type == "bicycle":
        item = session.query(Bicycle).get(item_id)
    elif item_type == "spare_part":
        item = session.query(SparePart).get(item_id)
    elif item_type == "accessory":
        item = session.query(Accessory).get(item_id)
    else:
        raise ValueError("Invalid item type")

    if not item:
        raise ValueError(f"{item_type.capitalize()} not found")

    if item.quantity_in_stock < quantity:
        raise ValueError("Not enough items in stock")

    order_item = OrderItem(order_id=order_id, quantity=quantity, price=item.price)

    if item_type == "bicycle":
        order_item.bicycle_id = item_id
    elif item_type == "spare_part":
        order_item.spare_part_id = item_id
    elif item_type == "accessory":
        order_item.accessory_id = item_id

    session.add(order_item)
    item.quantity_in_stock -= quantity
    order.total_amount = (order.total_amount or 0) + (item.price * quantity)

    session.commit()
    return order_item


def update_bicycle(session, bicycle_id, name=None, brand=None, model=None, description=None, price=None, quantity_in_stock=None, category=None, frame_material=None, wheel_size=None, color=None):
    """Updates the details of a bicycle."""
    bicycle = session.query(Bicycle).get(bicycle_id)
    if not bicycle:
        raise ValueError("Bicycle not found")

    if name:
        bicycle.name = name
    if brand:
        bicycle.brand = brand
    if model:
        bicycle.model = model
    if description:
        bicycle.description = description
    if price:
        bicycle.price = price
    if quantity_in_stock:
        bicycle.quantity_in_stock = quantity_in_stock
    if category:
        bicycle.category = category
    if frame_material:
        bicycle.frame_material = frame_material
    if wheel_size:
        bicycle.wheel_size = wheel_size
    if color:
        bicycle.color = color

    session.commit()
    return bicycle


def update_spare_part(session, spare_part_id, name=None, description=None, price=None, quantity_in_stock=None, category=None, brand=None, model=None, compatible_bicycles=None):
    """Updates the details of a spare part."""
    spare_part = session.query(SparePart).get(spare_part_id)
    if not spare_part:
        raise ValueError("Spare part not found")

    if name:
        spare_part.name = name
    if description:
        spare_part.description = description
    if price:
        spare_part.price = price
    if quantity_in_stock:
        spare_part.quantity_in_stock = quantity_in_stock
    if category:
        spare_part.category = category
    if brand:
        spare_part.brand = brand
    if model:
        spare_part.model = model
    if compatible_bicycles:
        spare_part.compatible_bicycles = compatible_bicycles

    session.commit()
    return spare_part


def update_accessory(session, accessory_id, name=None, description=None, price=None, quantity_in_stock=None, category=None, brand=None, model=None, size=None, color=None):
    """Updates the details of an accessory."""
    accessory = session.query(Accessory).get(accessory_id)
    if not accessory:
        raise ValueError("Accessory not found")

    if name:
        accessory.name = name
    if description:
        accessory.description = description
    if price:
        accessory.price = price
    if quantity_in_stock:
        accessory.quantity_in_stock = quantity_in_stock
    if category:
        accessory.category = category
    if brand:
        accessory.brand = brand
    if model:
        accessory.model = model
    if size:
        accessory.size = size
    if color:
        accessory.color = color

    session.commit()
    return accessory


def delete_bicycle(session, bicycle_id):
    """Deletes a bicycle from the database."""
    bicycle = session.query(Bicycle).get(bicycle_id)
    if not bicycle:
        raise ValueError("Bicycle not found")

    session.delete(bicycle)
    session.commit()


def delete_spare_part(session, spare_part_id):
    """Deletes a spare part from the database."""
    spare_part = session.query(SparePart).get(spare_part_id)
    if not spare_part:
        raise ValueError("Spare part not found")

    session.delete(spare_part)
    session.commit()


def delete_accessory(session, accessory_id):
    """Deletes an accessory from the database."""
    accessory = session.query(Accessory).get(accessory_id)
    if not accessory:
        raise ValueError("Accessory not found")

    session.delete(accessory)
    session.commit()


def get_bicycle(session, bicycle_id):
    """Retrieves a bicycle by its ID."""
    return session.query(Bicycle).get(bicycle_id)


def get_spare_part(session, spare_part_id):
    """Retrieves a spare part by its ID."""
    return session.query(SparePart).get(spare_part_id)


def get_accessory(session, accessory_id):
    """Retrieves an accessory by its ID."""
    return session.query(Accessory).get(accessory_id)


def search_bicycles(session, search_term):
    """Searches for bicycles by name, brand, or model."""
    return session.query(Bicycle).filter(
        (Bicycle.name.contains(search_term)) |
        (Bicycle.brand.contains(search_term)) |
        (Bicycle.model.contains(search_term))
    ).all()


def search_spare_parts(session, search_term):
    """Searches for spare parts by name, brand, or model."""
    return session.query(SparePart).filter(
        (SparePart.name.contains(search_term)) |
        (SparePart.brand.contains(search_term)) |
        (SparePart.model.contains(search_term))
    ).all()


def search_accessories(session, search_term):
    """Searches for accessories by name, brand, or model."""
    return session.query(Accessory).filter(
        (Accessory.name.contains(search_term)) |
        (Accessory.brand.contains(search_term)) |
        (Accessory.model.contains(search_term))
    ).all()


def list_bicycles(session):
    """Lists all bicycles in the database."""
    return session.query(Bicycle).all()


def list_spare_parts(session):
    """Lists all spare parts in the database."""
    return session.query(SparePart).all()


def list_accessories(session):
    """Lists all accessories in the database."""
    return session.query(Accessory).all()


def close_session(session):
    """Closes the database session."""
    session.close()

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    model = Column(String(255))
    frame_material = Column(String(255))
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    gears = Column(Integer)
    weight = Column(Float)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    parts = relationship("Part", secondary="bicycle_parts", back_populates="bicycles")
    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Part(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    category = Column(String(255))  # e.g., "Tires", "Brakes", "Chains"
    brand = Column(String(255))
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    bicycles = relationship("Bicycle", secondary="bicycle_parts", back_populates="parts")
    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Part(name='{self.name}', price={self.price}, category='{self.category}')>"

bicycle_parts = sqlalchemy.Table(
    'bicycle_parts', Base.metadata,
    Column('bicycle_id', Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), primary_key=True),
    Column('part_id', Integer, ForeignKey('parts.id'), primary_key=True)
)

class Supplement(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'supplements'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    type = Column(String(255)) # e.g., "Energy Gel", "Protein Bar", "Electrolyte Drink"
    weight = Column(Float) # Weight in grams or ml
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="supplement")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Supplement(name='{self.name}', price={self.price}, type='{self.type}')>"

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String(255), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = Column(String(255), nullable=False)  # In real app, hash this!
    email = Column(String(255), unique=True)
    first_name = Column(String(255))
    last_name = Column(String(255))
    address = Column(String(255))
    phone_number = Column(String(20))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="user")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<User(username='{self.username}', email='{self.email}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'), nullable=False)
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.utcnow)
    total_amount = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    shipping_address = Column(String(255))
    order_status = Column(String(50), default="Pending") # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="orders")
    items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, user_id={self.user_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'), nullable=False)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))
    part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('parts.id'))
    supplement_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('supplements.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="orders")
    part = relationship("Part", back_populates="orders")
    supplement = relationship("Supplement", back_populates="orders")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"

class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)

    def open_session(self):
        return self.Session()

    def close_session(self, session):
        session.close()

    def add_object(self, obj):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            session.add(obj)
            session.commit()
        except Exception as e:
            session.rollback()
            print(f"Error adding object: {e}")
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def delete_object(self, obj):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            session.delete(obj)
            session.commit()
        except Exception as e:
            session.rollback()
            print(f"Error deleting object: {e}")
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def update_object(self, obj):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            session.merge(obj)
            session.commit()
        except Exception as e:
            session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating object: {e}")
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def get_all(self, model):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            return session.query(model).all()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error getting all objects: {e}")
            return []
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def get_by_id(self, model, id):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            return session.query(model).get(id)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error getting object by ID: {e}")
            return None
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def filter_objects(self, model, **kwargs):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            query = session.query(model)
            for key, value in kwargs.items():
                query = query.filter(getattr(model, key) == value)
            return query.all()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error filtering objects: {e}")
            return []
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def search_objects(self, model, search_term, *fields):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            from sqlalchemy import or_
            query = session.query(model)
            search_filters = [getattr(model, field).like(f"%{search_term}%") for field in fields]
            query = query.filter(or_(*search_filters))
            return query.all()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error searching objects: {e}")
            return []
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

if __name__ == '__main__':

    db_url = 'sqlite:///./bicycle_store.db'  # Use an in-memory database for testing
    db_manager = DatabaseManager(db_url)

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    model = Column(String(255))
    frame_material = Column(String(255))
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    gears = Column(Integer)
    weight = Column(Float)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    parts = relationship("Part", secondary="bicycle_parts", back_populates="bicycles")
    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Part(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    category = Column(String(255))  # e.g., "Tires", "Brakes", "Chains"
    brand = Column(String(255))
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    bicycles = relationship("Bicycle", secondary="bicycle_parts", back_populates="parts")
    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Part(name='{self.name}', price={self.price}, category='{self.category}')>"

bicycle_parts = sqlalchemy.Table(
    'bicycle_parts', Base.metadata,
    Column('bicycle_id', Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), primary_key=True),
    Column('part_id', Integer, ForeignKey('parts.id'), primary_key=True)
)

class Supplement(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'supplements'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    type = Column(String(255)) # e.g., "Energy Gel", "Protein Bar", "Electrolyte Drink"
    weight = Column(Float) # Weight in grams or ml
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="supplement")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Supplement(name='{self.name}', price={self.price}, type='{self.type}')>"

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String(255), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = Column(String(255), nullable=False)  # In real app, hash this!
    email = Column(String(255), unique=True)
    first_name = Column(String(255))
    last_name = Column(String(255))
    address = Column(String(255))
    phone_number = Column(String(20))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="user")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<User(username='{self.username}', email='{self.email}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'), nullable=False)
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.utcnow)
    total_amount = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    shipping_address = Column(String(255))
    order_status = Column(String(50), default="Pending") # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="orders")
    items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, user_id={self.user_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'), nullable=False)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))
    part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('parts.id'))
    supplement_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('supplements.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="orders")
    part = relationship("Part", back_populates="orders")
    supplement = relationship("Supplement", back_populates="orders")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"

class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)

    def open_session(self):
        return self.Session()

    def close_session(self, session):
        session.close()

    def add_object(self, obj):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            session.add(obj)
            session.commit()
        except Exception as e:
            session.rollback()
            print(f"Error adding object: {e}")
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def delete_object(self, obj):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            session.delete(obj)
            session.commit()
        except Exception as e:
            session.rollback()
            print(f"Error deleting object: {e}")
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def update_object(self, obj):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            session.merge(obj)
            session.commit()
        except Exception as e:
            session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating object: {e}")
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def get_all(self, model):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            return session.query(model).all()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error getting all objects: {e}")
            return []
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def get_by_id(self, model, id):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            return session.query(model).get(id)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error getting object by ID: {e}")
            return None
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def filter_objects(self, model, **kwargs):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            query = session.query(model)
            for key, value in kwargs.items():
                query = query.filter(getattr(model, key) == value)
            return query.all()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error filtering objects: {e}")
            return []
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def search_objects(self, model, search_term, *fields):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            from sqlalchemy import or_
            query = session.query(model)
            search_filters = [getattr(model, field).like(f"%{search_term}%") for field in fields]
            query = query.filter(or_(*search_filters))
            return query.all()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error searching objects: {e}")
            return []
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)

    def open_session(self):
        return self.Session()

    def close_session(self, session):
        session.close()

    def add_object(self, obj):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            session.add(obj)
            session.commit()
        except Exception as e:
            session.rollback()
            print(f"Error adding object: {e}")
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def delete_object(self, obj):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            session.delete(obj)
            session.commit()
        except Exception as e:
            session.rollback()
            print(f"Error deleting object: {e}")
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def update_object(self, obj):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            session.merge(obj)
            session.commit()
        except Exception as e:
            session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating object: {e}")
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def get_all(self, model):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            return session.query(model).all()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error getting all objects: {e}")
            return []
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def get_by_id(self, model, id):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            return session.query(model).get(id)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error getting object by ID: {e}")
            return None
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def filter_objects(self, model, **kwargs):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            query = session.query(model)
            for key, value in kwargs.items():
                query = query.filter(getattr(model, key) == value)
            return query.all()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error filtering objects: {e}")
            return []
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

    def search_objects(self, model, search_term, *fields):
        session = self.open_session()
        try:
            from sqlalchemy import or_
            query = session.query(model)
            search_filters = [getattr(model, field).like(f"%{search_term}%") for field in fields]
            query = query.filter(or_(*search_filters))
            return query.all()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error searching objects: {e}")
            return []
        finally:
            self.close_session(session)

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    model = Column(String(255))
    frame_material = Column(String(255))
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    gears = Column(Integer)
    weight = Column(Float)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    parts = relationship("Part", secondary="bicycle_parts", back_populates="bicycles")
    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Part(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    category = Column(String(255))  # e.g., "Tires", "Brakes", "Chains"
    brand = Column(String(255))
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    bicycles = relationship("Bicycle", secondary="bicycle_parts", back_populates="parts")
    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Part(name='{self.name}', price={self.price}, category='{self.category}')>"

bicycle_parts = sqlalchemy.Table(
    'bicycle_parts', Base.metadata,
    Column('bicycle_id', Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), primary_key=True),
    Column('part_id', Integer, ForeignKey('parts.id'), primary_key=True)
)

class Supplement(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'supplements'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    type = Column(String(255)) # e.g., "Energy Gel", "Protein Bar", "Electrolyte Drink"
    weight = Column(Float) # Weight in grams or ml
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="supplement")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Supplement(name='{self.name}', price={self.price}, type='{self.type}')>"

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String(255), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = Column(String(255), nullable=False)  # In real app, hash this!
    email = Column(String(255), unique=True)
    first_name = Column(String(255))
    last_name = Column(String(255))
    address = Column(String(255))
    phone_number = Column(String(20))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="user")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<User(username='{self.username}', email='{self.email}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'), nullable=False)
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.utcnow)
    total_amount = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    shipping_address = Column(String(255))
    order_status = Column(String(50), default="Pending") # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="orders")
    items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, user_id={self.user_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'), nullable=False)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))
    part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('parts.id'))

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = Column(String, nullable=False)
    email = Column(String, unique=True)
    address = Column(String)
    phone_number = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="user")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<User(username='{self.username}', email='{self.email}')>"

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False)
    description = Column(String)

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    image_url = Column(String)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'))

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    status = Column(String, default='Pending')  # e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, user_id={self.user_id}, total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price_per_item = Column(Float, nullable=False)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"

class ShoppingCart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'shopping_carts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, default=1)

    # Define relationships if needed (e.g., to User and Product)
    # user = relationship("User", back_populates="shopping_cart")
    # product = relationship("Product", back_populates="shopping_cart")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<ShoppingCart(user_id={self.user_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"

def create_db_engine(db_url):
    engine = create_engine(db_url)
    return engine

def create_tables(engine):
    Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

def create_session(engine):
    Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
    return Session()

def close_session(session):
    session.close()

# CRUD operations examples (using Product table as an example)

def add_product(session, name, description, price, image_url, stock_quantity, category_id):
    new_product = Product(name=name, description=description, price=price, image_url=image_url, stock_quantity=stock_quantity, category_id=category_id)
    session.add(new_product)
    session.commit()
    return new_product

def get_product_by_id(session, product_id):
    return session.query(Product).filter(Product.id == product_id).first()

def update_product(session, product_id, name=None, description=None, price=None, image_url=None, stock_quantity=None, category_id=None):
    product = get_product_by_id(session, product_id)
    if product:
        if name:
            product.name = name
        if description:
            product.description = description
        if price:
            product.price = price
        if image_url:
            product.image_url = image_url
        if stock_quantity:
            product.stock_quantity = stock_quantity
        if category_id:
            product.category_id = category_id
        session.commit()
        return product
    return None

def delete_product(session, product_id):
    product = get_product_by_id(session, product_id)
    if product:
        session.delete(product)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def filter_products_by_category(session, category_id):
    return session.query(Product).filter(Product.category_id == category_id).all()

def search_products(session, search_term):
    return session.query(Product).filter(Product.name.like(f"%{search_term}%")).all()

if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Replace with your database URL (e.g., 'sqlite:///./bicycle_shop.db' for SQLite)
    db_url = 'sqlite:///./bicycle_shop.db'
    engine = create_db_engine(db_url)
    create_tables(engine)

    Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
    session = Session()

    # Example Usage:
    try:
        # Create some categories
        category_wheels = Category(name="Wheels", description="Bicycle wheels")
        category_tires = Category(name="Tires", description="Bicycle tires")
        session.add_all([category_wheels, category_tires])
        session.commit()

        # Add a product
        new_product = add_product(session, name="Shimano Dura-Ace Wheelset", description="High-performance road bike wheelset", price=1200.00, image_url="wheel.jpg", stock_quantity=10, category_id=category_wheels.id)
        print(f"Added product: {new_product}")

        # Get a product by ID
        product = get_product_by_id(session, new_product.id)
        print(f"Product by ID: {product}")

        # Update a product
        updated_product = update_product(session, new_product.id, price=1250.00, stock_quantity=8)
        print(f"Updated product: {updated_product}")

        # Filter products by category
        wheels = filter_products_by_category(session, category_wheels.id)
        print(f"Wheels: {wheels}")

        # Search for products
        search_results = search_products(session, "Shimano")
        print(f"Search results: {search_results}")

        # Create a user
        new_user = User(username="testuser", password="password", email="test@example.com")
        session.add(new_user)
        session.commit()

        # Create an order
        new_order = Order(user_id=new_user.id, total_amount=1250.00)
        session.add(new_order)
        session.commit()

        # Create an order item

    finally:
        close_session(session)

        product = get_product_by_id(session, new_product.id)
