        # Update a product
        updated_product = update_product(session, new_product.id, price=1250.00, stock_quantity=8)
        print(f"Updated product: {updated_product}")

        # Filter products by category
        wheels = filter_products_by_category(session, category_wheels.id)
        print(f"Wheels: {wheels}")

        # Search for products
        search_results = search_products(session, "Shimano")
        print(f"Search results: {search_results}")

        # Create a user
        new_user = User(username="testuser", password="password", email="test@example.com")
        session.add(new_user)
        session.commit()

        # Create an order
        new_order = Order(user_id=new_user.id, total_amount=1250.00)
        session.add(new_order)
        session.commit()

        # Create an order item
        new_order_item = OrderItem(order_id=new_order.id, product_id=new_product.id, quantity=1, price_per_item=new_product.price)
        session.add(new_order_item)
        session.commit()

        # Delete a product (commented out to avoid accidental deletion)

        # else:
        #     print("Product not found for deletion.")

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"An error occurred: {e}")
        session.rollback()  # Rollback changes in case of error

    finally:
        close_session(session)

        new_order_item = OrderItem(order_id=new_order.id, product_id=new_product.id, quantity=1, price_per_item=new_product.price)
        session.add(new_order_item)
        session.commit()

        # else:
        #     print("Product not found for deletion.")

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"An error occurred: {e}")
        session.rollback()  # Rollback changes in case of error

    finally:
        close_session(session)

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', model='{self.model}', brand='{self.brand}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"

class Part(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id')) # Optional: Link to a specific bicycle model

    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", backref="parts")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Part(name='{self.name}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"

class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"

class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String)
    phone_number = Column(String)
    address = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(String) # Or use DateTime type
    total_amount = Column(Float)

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date='{self.order_date}', total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    item_type = Column(String) # 'bicycle', 'part', 'accessory'
    item_id = Column(Integer) # ID of the bicycle, part, or accessory
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    price = Column(Float) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, item_type='{self.item_type}', item_id={self.item_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"

from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', model='{self.model}', brand='{self.brand}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"

class Part(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id')) # Optional: Link to a specific bicycle model

    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", backref="parts")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Part(name='{self.name}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"

class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"

class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String)
    phone_number = Column(String)
    address = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(String) # Or use DateTime type
    total_amount = Column(Float)

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date='{self.order_date}', total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    item_type = Column(String) # 'bicycle', 'part', 'accessory'
    item_id = Column(Integer) # ID of the bicycle, part, or accessory
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    price = Column(Float) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, item_type='{self.item_type}', item_id={self.item_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"

# Database connection
engine = create_engine('sqlite:///./bicycle_shop.db')  # Use SQLite for simplicity
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

# Session creation
Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
session = Session()

# --- Common operations ---

def add_bicycle(name, model, brand, price, description, stock_quantity):
    new_bicycle = Bicycle(name=name, model=model, brand=brand, price=price, description=description, stock_quantity=stock_quantity)
    session.add(new_bicycle)
    session.commit()
    return new_bicycle

def get_bicycle_by_id(bicycle_id):
    return session.query(Bicycle).filter(Bicycle.id == bicycle_id).first()

def update_bicycle_stock(bicycle_id, new_stock):
    bicycle = get_bicycle_by_id(bicycle_id)
    if bicycle:
        bicycle.stock_quantity = new_stock
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def delete_bicycle(bicycle_id):
    bicycle = get_bicycle_by_id(bicycle_id)
    if bicycle:
        session.delete(bicycle)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def search_bicycles(query):
    return session.query(Bicycle).filter(Bicycle.name.contains(query) | Bicycle.model.contains(query) | Bicycle.brand.contains(query)).all()

def filter_bicycles_by_price(min_price, max_price):
    return session.query(Bicycle).filter(Bicycle.price >= min_price, Bicycle.price <= max_price).all()

def add_part(name, description, price, stock_quantity, bicycle_id=None):
    new_part = Part(name=name, description=description, price=price, stock_quantity=stock_quantity, bicycle_id=bicycle_id)
    session.add(new_part)
    session.commit()
    return new_part

def get_part_by_id(part_id):
    return session.query(Part).filter(Part.id == part_id).first()

def update_part_stock(part_id, new_stock):
    part = get_part_by_id(part_id)
    if part:
        part.stock_quantity = new_stock
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def delete_part(part_id):
    part = get_part_by_id(part_id)
    if part:
        session.delete(part)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def search_parts(query):
    return session.query(Part).filter(Part.name.contains(query) | Part.description.contains(query)).all()

def filter_parts_by_price(min_price, max_price):
    return session.query(Part).filter(Part.price >= min_price, Part.price <= max_price).all()

def add_accessory(name, description, price, stock_quantity):
    new_accessory = Accessory(name=name, description=description, price=price, stock_quantity=stock_quantity)
    session.add(new_accessory)
    session.commit()
    return new_accessory

def get_accessory_by_id(accessory_id):
    return session.query(Accessory).filter(Accessory.id == accessory_id).first()

def update_accessory_stock(accessory_id, new_stock):
    accessory = get_accessory_by_id(accessory_id)
    if accessory:
        accessory.stock_quantity = new_stock
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def delete_accessory(accessory_id):
    accessory = get_accessory_by_id(accessory_id)
    if accessory:
        session.delete(accessory)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def search_accessories(query):
    return session.query(Accessory).filter(Accessory.name.contains(query) | Accessory.description.contains(query)).all()

def filter_accessories_by_price(min_price, max_price):
    return session.query(Accessory).filter(Accessory.price >= min_price, Accessory.price <= max_price).all()

def add_customer(first_name, last_name, email, phone_number, address):
    new_customer = Customer(first_name=first_name, last_name=last_name, email=email, phone_number=phone_number, address=address)
    session.add(new_customer)
    session.commit()
    return new_customer

def get_customer_by_id(customer_id):
    return session.query(Customer).filter(Customer.id == customer_id).first()

def update_customer_info(customer_id, first_name=None, last_name=None, email=None, phone_number=None, address=None):
    customer = get_customer_by_id(customer_id)
    if customer:
        if first_name:
            customer.first_name = first_name
        if last_name:
            customer.last_name = last_name
        if email:
            customer.email = email
        if phone_number:
            customer.phone_number = phone_number
        if address:
            customer.address = address
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def delete_customer(customer_id):
    customer = get_customer_by_id(customer_id)
    if customer:
        session.delete(customer)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def search_customers(query):
    return session.query(Customer).filter(Customer.first_name.contains(query) | Customer.last_name.contains(query) | Customer.email.contains(query)).all()

def add_order(customer_id, order_date, total_amount):
    new_order = Order(customer_id=customer_id, order_date=order_date, total_amount=total_amount)
    session.add(new_order)
    session.commit()
    return new_order

def get_order_by_id(order_id):
    return session.query(Order).filter(Order.id == order_id).first()

def update_order_total(order_id, new_total):
    order = get_order_by_id(order_id)
    if order:
        order.total_amount = new_total
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def delete_order(order_id):
    order = get_order_by_id(order_id)
    if order:
        session.delete(order)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def get_orders_by_customer(customer_id):
    return session.query(Order).filter(Order.customer_id == customer_id).all()

def add_order_item(order_id, item_type, item_id, quantity, price):
    new_order_item = OrderItem(order_id=order_id, item_type=item_type, item_id=item_id, quantity=quantity, price=price)
    session.add(new_order_item)
    session.commit()
    return new_order_item

def get_order_item_by_id(order_item_id):
    return session.query(OrderItem).filter(OrderItem.id == order_item_id).first()

def update_order_item_quantity(order_item_id, new_quantity):
    order_item = get_order_item_by_id(order_item_id)
    if order_item:
        order_item.quantity = new_quantity
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def delete_order_item(order_item_id):
    order_item = get_order_item_by_id(order_item_id)
    if order_item:
        session.delete(order_item)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def get_order_items_by_order(order_id):
    return session.query(OrderItem).filter(OrderItem.order_id == order_id).all()

# Example Usage:
if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Add a bicycle
    bicycle1 = add_bicycle("Mountain Bike", "Trailblazer 2000", "Awesome Bikes", 799.99, "A great mountain bike for hitting the trails.", 10)
    print(f"Added bicycle: {bicycle1}")

    # Add a part
    part1 = add_part("Shimano Deore XT Derailleur", "High-performance rear derailleur", 129.99, 25, bicycle_id=bicycle1.id)
    print(f"Added part: {part1}")

    # Add an accessory
    accessory1 = add_accessory("Bike Helmet", "Protective helmet for cycling", 49.99, 50)
    print(f"Added accessory: {accessory1}")

    # Add a customer
    customer1 = add_customer("John", "Doe", "john.doe@example.com", "555-123-4567", "123 Main St")
    print(f"Added customer: {customer1}")

    # Add an order
    order1 = add_order(customer1.id, "2023-10-27", 979.97)
    print(f"Added order: {order1}")

    # Add order items
    order_item1 = add_order_item(order1.id, "bicycle", bicycle1.id, 1, bicycle1.price)
    order_item2 = add_order_item(order1.id, "accessory", accessory1.id, 1, accessory1.price)
    print(f"Added order items: {order_item1}, {order_item2}")

    # Search for bicycles
    search_results = search_bicycles("Mountain")
    print(f"Search results for 'Mountain': {search_results}")

    # Filter bicycles by price
    filtered_bicycles = filter_bicycles_by_price(700, 800)
    print(f"Bicycles between $700 and $800: {filtered_bicycles}")

    # Get orders by customer
    customer_orders = get_orders_by_customer(customer1.id)
    print(f"Orders for customer {customer1.first_name}: {customer_orders}")

    # Update bicycle stock
    update_bicycle_stock(bicycle1.id, 15)
    updated_bicycle = get_bicycle_by_id(bicycle1.id)
    print(f"Updated bicycle stock: {updated_bicycle}")

    # Delete a part
    delete_part(part1.id)
    deleted_part = get_part_by_id(part1.id)
    print(f"Deleted part: {deleted_part}") # Should be None

    # Close the session
    session.close()

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', model='{self.model}', brand='{self.brand}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"

class Part(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Brakes", "Wheels", "Gears"

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Part(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"

class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer)
    type = Column(String) # e.g., "Helmet", "Lights", "Locks"

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', type='{self.type}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_name = Column(String)
    customer_email = Column(String)
    order_date = Column(String) #Consider using Date or DateTime type
    total_amount = Column(Float)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer='{self.customer_name}', date='{self.order_date}', total={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    item_type = Column(String) # "bicycle", "part", "accessory"
    item_id = Column(Integer) # ID of the bicycle, part, or accessory
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    price = Column(Float) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, item_type='{self.item_type}', item_id={self.item_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"

Order.items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")


class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = self.Session()

    def add_bicycle(self, name, model, brand, price, description, stock_quantity):
        bicycle = Bicycle(name=name, model=model, brand=brand, price=price, description=description, stock_quantity=stock_quantity)
        self.session.add(bicycle)
        self.session.commit()
        return bicycle

    def get_bicycle(self, bicycle_id):
        return self.session.query(Bicycle).filter(Bicycle.id == bicycle_id).first()

    def update_bicycle(self, bicycle_id, name=None, model=None, brand=None, price=None, description=None, stock_quantity=None):
        bicycle = self.get_bicycle(bicycle_id)
        if bicycle:
            if name is not None:
                bicycle.name = name
            if model is not None:
                bicycle.model = model
            if brand is not None:
                bicycle.brand = brand
            if price is not None:
                bicycle.price = price
            if description is not None:
                bicycle.description = description
            if stock_quantity is not None:
                bicycle.stock_quantity = stock_quantity
            self.session.commit()
            return bicycle
        return None

    def delete_bicycle(self, bicycle_id):
        bicycle = self.get_bicycle(bicycle_id)
        if bicycle:
            self.session.delete(bicycle)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def search_bicycles(self, search_term):
        return self.session.query(Bicycle).filter(
            sqlalchemy.or_(
                Bicycle.name.contains(search_term),
                Bicycle.model.contains(search_term),
                Bicycle.brand.contains(search_term),
                Bicycle.description.contains(search_term)
            )
        ).all()

    def add_part(self, name, description, price, stock_quantity, category):
        part = Part(name=name, description=description, price=price, stock_quantity=stock_quantity, category=category)
        self.session.add(part)
        self.session.commit()
        return part

    def get_part(self, part_id):
        return self.session.query(Part).filter(Part.id == part_id).first()

    def update_part(self, part_id, name=None, description=None, price=None, stock_quantity=None, category=None):
        part = self.get_part(part_id)
        if part:
            if name is not None:
                part.name = name
            if description is not None:
                part.description = description
            if price is not None:
                part.price = price
            if stock_quantity is not None:
                part.stock_quantity = stock_quantity
            if category is not None:
                part.category = category
            self.session.commit()
            return part
        return None

    def delete_part(self, part_id):
        part = self.get_part(part_id)
        if part:
            self.session.delete(part)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def search_parts(self, search_term):
        return self.session.query(Part).filter(
            sqlalchemy.or_(
                Part.name.contains(search_term),
                Part.description.contains(search_term),
                Part.category.contains(search_term)
            )
        ).all()

    def add_accessory(self, name, description, price, stock_quantity, type):
        accessory = Accessory(name=name, description=description, price=price, stock_quantity=stock_quantity, type=type)
        self.session.add(accessory)
        self.session.commit()
        return accessory

    def get_accessory(self, accessory_id):
        return self.session.query(Accessory).filter(Accessory.id == accessory_id).first()

    def update_accessory(self, accessory_id, name=None, description=None, price=None, stock_quantity=None, type=None):
        accessory = self.get_accessory(accessory_id)
        if accessory:
            if name is not None:
                accessory.name = name
            if description is not None:
                accessory.description = description
            if price is not None:
                accessory.price = price
            if stock_quantity is not None:
                accessory.stock_quantity = stock_quantity
            if type is not None:
                accessory.type = type
            self.session.commit()
            return accessory
        return None

    def delete_accessory(self, accessory_id):
        accessory = self.get_accessory(accessory_id)
        if accessory:
            self.session.delete(accessory)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def search_accessories(self, search_term):
        return self.session.query(Accessory).filter(
            sqlalchemy.or_(
                Accessory.name.contains(search_term),
                Accessory.description.contains(search_term),
                Accessory.type.contains(search_term)
            )
        ).all()

    def add_order(self, customer_name, customer_email, order_date, total_amount):
        order = Order(customer_name=customer_name, customer_email=customer_email, order_date=order_date, total_amount=total_amount)
        self.session.add(order)
        self.session.commit()
        return order

    def get_order(self, order_id):
        return self.session.query(Order).filter(Order.id == order_id).first()

    def add_order_item(self, order_id, item_type, item_id, quantity, price):
        order_item = OrderItem(order_id=order_id, item_type=item_type, item_id=item_id, quantity=quantity, price=price)
        self.session.add(order_item)
        self.session.commit()
        return order_item

    def close(self):
        self.session.close()

if __name__ == '__main__':

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', model='{self.model}', brand='{self.brand}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"

class Part(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Brakes", "Wheels", "Gears"

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Part(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"

class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer)
    type = Column(String) # e.g., "Helmet", "Lights", "Locks"

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', type='{self.type}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_name = Column(String)
    customer_email = Column(String)
    order_date = Column(String) #Consider using Date or DateTime type
    total_amount = Column(Float)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer='{self.customer_name}', date='{self.order_date}', total={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    item_type = Column(String) # "bicycle", "part", "accessory"
    item_id = Column(Integer) # ID of the bicycle, part, or accessory
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    price = Column(Float) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, item_type='{self.item_type}', item_id={self.item_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"

Order.items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")


class DatabaseManager:

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(50), nullable=False, unique=True)
    description = Column(String(255))

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'))
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    last_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), nullable=False, unique=True)
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    address = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    status = Column(String(50), default='Pending') # e.g., Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"


class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = self.Session()

    def create_category(self, name, description=None):
        category = Category(name=name, description=description)
        self.session.add(category)
        self.session.commit()
        return category

    def get_category_by_name(self, name):
        return self.session.query(Category).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def create_product(self, name, description, price, stock_quantity, category_name, image_url=None):
        category = self.get_category_by_name(category_name)
        if not category:
            raise ValueError(f"Category '{category_name}' not found.")

        product = Product(name=name, description=description, price=price,
                          stock_quantity=stock_quantity, category=category, image_url=image_url)
        self.session.add(product)
        self.session.commit()
        return product

    def get_product_by_name(self, name):
        return self.session.query(Product).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def update_product_stock(self, product_name, new_quantity):
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)
        if product:
            product.stock_quantity = new_quantity
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def delete_product(self, product_name):
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)
        if product:
            self.session.delete(product)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def create_customer(self, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number=None, address=None):
        customer = Customer(first_name=first_name, last_name=last_name,
                            email=email, phone_number=phone_number, address=address)
        self.session.add(customer)
        self.session.commit()
        return customer

    def get_customer_by_email(self, email):
        return self.session.query(Customer).filter_by(email=email).first()

    def create_order(self, customer_email):
        customer = self.get_customer_by_email(customer_email)
        if not customer:
            raise ValueError(f"Customer with email '{customer_email}' not found.")

        order = Order(customer=customer)
        self.session.add(order)
        self.session.commit()
        return order

    def add_item_to_order(self, order_id, product_name, quantity):
        order = self.session.query(Order).get(order_id)
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)

        if not order or not product:
            raise ValueError("Order or Product not found.")

        if product.stock_quantity < quantity:
            raise ValueError("Not enough stock.")

        order_item = OrderItem(order=order, product=product, quantity=quantity, price=product.price)
        self.session.add(order_item)

        product.stock_quantity -= quantity
        order.total_amount += product.price * quantity

        self.session.commit()
        return order_item

    def get_order(self, order_id):
        return self.session.query(Order).get(order_id)

    def update_order_status(self, order_id, new_status):
        order = self.get_order(order_id)
        if order:
            order.status = new_status
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def search_products(self, search_term):
        return self.session.query(Product).filter(Product.name.ilike(f"%{search_term}%")).all()

    def filter_products_by_price(self, min_price=None, max_price=None):
        query = self.session.query(Product)
        if min_price is not None:
            query = query.filter(Product.price >= min_price)
        if max_price is not None:
            query = query.filter(Product.price <= max_price)
        return query.all()

    def calculate_total_sales(self):
        # Calculate the total sales amount from all orders.
        total_sales = self.session.query(sqlalchemy.func.sum(Order.total_amount)).scalar()
        return total_sales if total_sales else 0.0

    def close(self):
        self.session.close()
        self.engine.dispose()


if __name__ == '__main__':
    db_url = 'sqlite:///./cycle_store.db'  # Use an in-memory database for testing
    db_manager = DatabaseManager(db_url)

    # Example Usage
    try:
        # Create Categories
        mountain_bikes_category = db_manager.create_category(name='Mountain Bikes', description='Bikes for off-road adventures')
        road_bikes_category = db_manager.create_category(name='Road Bikes', description='Bikes for speed and efficiency on paved roads')
        accessories_category = db_manager.create_category(name="Accessories", description="Cycle accessories")

        # Create Products
        db_manager.create_product(name='Trek Marlin 5', description='Entry-level mountain bike', price=550.00, stock_quantity=10, category_name='Mountain Bikes', image_url="trek_marlin.jpg")
        db_manager.create_product(name='Giant Contend AR 3', description='Versatile road bike', price=1200.00, stock_quantity=5, category_name='Road Bikes', image_url="giant_contend.jpg")
        db_manager.create_product(name='Bike Helmet', description='Essential safety gear', price=50.00, stock_quantity=20, category_name='Accessories', image_url="bike_helmet.jpg")

        # Create Customer
        customer1 = db_manager.create_customer(first_name='John', last_name='Doe', email='john.doe@example.com', phone_number='555-1234', address='123 Main St')

        # Create Order
        order1 = db_manager.create_order(customer_email='john.doe@example.com')

        # Add Items to Order
        db_manager.add_item_to_order(order1.id, 'Trek Marlin 5', 1)
        db_manager.add_item_to_order(order1.id, 'Bike Helmet', 2)

        # Get Order Details
        order = db_manager.get_order(order1.id)
        print(f"Order ID: {order.id}, Customer: {order.customer.first_name} {order.customer.last_name}, Total Amount: {order.total_amount}, Status: {order.status}")
        for item in order.order_items:
            print(f"  - {item.product.name}: Quantity {item.quantity}, Price {item.price}")

        # Update Order Status
        db_manager.update_order_status(order1.id, 'Shipped')
        print(f"Order status updated to: {db_manager.get_order(order1.id).status}")

        # Search Products
        search_results = db_manager.search_products('bike')
        print("\nSearch results for 'bike':")
        for product in search_results:
            print(f"  - {product.name}: {product.price}")

        # Filter Products by Price
        filtered_products = db_manager.filter_products_by_price(min_price=500, max_price=1500)
        print("\nProducts between $500 and $1500:")
        for product in filtered_products:
            print(f"  - {product.name}: {product.price}")

        # Calculate Total Sales
        total_sales = db_manager.calculate_total_sales()
        print(f"\nTotal Sales: ${total_sales}")

        # Update Product Stock
        db_manager.update_product_stock('Trek Marlin 5', 8)
        print(f"Trek Marlin 5 stock updated to: {db_manager.get_product_by_name('Trek Marlin 5').stock_quantity}")

        # Delete Product
        db_manager.delete_product('Giant Contend AR 3')
        print("Giant Contend AR 3 deleted.")

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"An error occurred: {e}")

    finally:
        db_manager.close()

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(50), nullable=False, unique=True)
    description = Column(String(255))

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'))
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    last_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), nullable=False, unique=True)
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    address = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    status = Column(String(50), default='Pending') # e.g., Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"


class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = self.Session()

    def create_category(self, name, description=None):
        category = Category(name=name, description=description)
        self.session.add(category)
        self.session.commit()
        return category

    def get_category_by_name(self, name):
        return self.session.query(Category).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def create_product(self, name, description, price, stock_quantity, category_name, image_url=None):
        category = self.get_category_by_name(category_name)
        if not category:
            raise ValueError(f"Category '{category_name}' not found.")

        product = Product(name=name, description=description, price=price,
                          stock_quantity=stock_quantity, category=category, image_url=image_url)
        self.session.add(product)
        self.session.commit()
        return product

    def get_product_by_name(self, name):
        return self.session.query(Product).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def update_product_stock(self, product_name, new_quantity):
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)
        if product:
            product.stock_quantity = new_quantity
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def delete_product(self, product_name):
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)
        if product:
            self.session.delete(product)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def create_customer(self, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number=None, address=None):
        customer = Customer(first_name=first_name, last_name=last_name,
                            email=email, phone_number=phone_number, address=address)
        self.session.add(customer)
        self.session.commit()
        return customer

    def get_customer_by_email(self, email):
        return self.session.query(Customer).filter_by(email=email).first()

    def create_order(self, customer_email):
        customer = self.get_customer_by_email(customer_email)
        if not customer:
            raise ValueError(f"Customer with email '{customer_email}' not found.")

        order = Order(customer=customer)
        self.session.add(order)
        self.session.commit()
        return order

    def add_item_to_order(self, order_id, product_name, quantity):
        order = self.session.query(Order).get(order_id)
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)

        if not order or not product:
            raise ValueError("Order or Product not found.")

        if product.stock_quantity < quantity:
            raise ValueError("Not enough stock.")

        order_item = OrderItem(order=order, product=product, quantity=quantity, price=product.price)
        self.session.add(order_item)

        product.stock_quantity -= quantity
        order.total_amount += product.price * quantity

        self.session.commit()
        return order_item

    def get_order(self, order_id):
        return self.session.query(Order).get(order_id)

    def update_order_status(self, order_id, new_status):
        order = self.get_order(order_id)
        if order:
            order.status = new_status
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def search_products(self, search_term):
        return self.session.query(Product).filter(Product.name.ilike(f"%{search_term}%")).all()

    def filter_products_by_price(self, min_price=None, max_price=None):
        query = self.session.query(Product)
        if min_price is not None:
            query = query.filter(Product.price >= min_price)
        if max_price is not None:
            query = query.filter(Product.price <= max_price)
        return query.all()

    def calculate_total_sales(self):
        # Calculate the total sales amount from all orders.
        total_sales = self.session.query(sqlalchemy.func.sum(Order.total_amount)).scalar()
        return total_sales if total_sales else 0.0

    def close(self):
        self.session.close()
        self.engine.dispose()


if __name__ == '__main__':

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship, sessionmaker
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(50), nullable=False, unique=True)
    description = Column(String(255))

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'))
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    last_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), nullable=False, unique=True)

    address = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.utcnow)
    total_amount = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    status = Column(String(50), default="Pending") # e.g., Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"

class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = self.Session()

    def create_category(self, name, description=None):
        category = Category(name=name, description=description)
        self.session.add(category)
        self.session.commit()
        return category

    def get_category_by_name(self, name):
        return self.session.query(Category).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def create_product(self, name, description, price, stock_quantity, category_name, image_url=None):
        category = self.get_category_by_name(category_name)
        if not category:
            raise ValueError(f"Category '{category_name}' not found.")

        product = Product(name=name, description=description, price=price,
                          stock_quantity=stock_quantity, category=category, image_url=image_url)
        self.session.add(product)
        self.session.commit()
        return product

    def get_product_by_name(self, name):
        return self.session.query(Product).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def update_product_stock(self, product_name, new_quantity):
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)
        if product:
            product.stock_quantity = new_quantity
            self.session.commit()
        else:
            print(f"Product '{product_name}' not found.")

    def delete_product(self, product_name):
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)
        if product:
            self.session.delete(product)
            self.session.commit()
        else:
            print(f"Product '{product_name}' not found.")

    def create_customer(self, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number=None, address=None):
        customer = Customer(first_name=first_name, last_name=last_name, email=email,
                            phone_number=phone_number, address=address)
        self.session.add(customer)
        self.session.commit()
        return customer

    def get_customer_by_email(self, email):
        return self.session.query(Customer).filter_by(email=email).first()

    def create_order(self, customer_email):
        customer = self.get_customer_by_email(customer_email)
        if not customer:
            raise ValueError(f"Customer with email '{customer_email}' not found.")

        order = Order(customer=customer)
        self.session.add(order)
        self.session.commit()
        return order

    def get_order_by_id(self, order_id):
        return self.session.query(Order).filter_by(id=order_id).first()

    def add_order_item(self, order_id, product_name, quantity):
        order = self.get_order_by_id(order_id)
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)

        if not order:
            raise ValueError(f"Order with id '{order_id}' not found.")
        if not product:
            raise ValueError(f"Product '{product_name}' not found.")

        if product.stock_quantity < quantity:
            raise ValueError(f"Not enough stock for product '{product_name}'.")

        order_item = OrderItem(order=order, product=product, quantity=quantity, price=product.price)
        self.session.add(order_item)

        product.stock_quantity -= quantity
        order.total_amount += product.price * quantity

        self.session.commit()
        return order_item

    def update_order_status(self, order_id, new_status):
        order = self.get_order_by_id(order_id)
        if order:
            order.status = new_status
            self.session.commit()
        else:
            print(f"Order '{order_id}' not found.")

    def search_products(self, search_term):
        return self.session.query(Product).filter(Product.name.contains(search_term) | Product.description.contains(search_term)).all()

    def get_products_by_category(self, category_name):
        category = self.get_category_by_name(category_name)
        if category:
            return category.products
        else:
            return []

    def calculate_total_sales(self):
        # Calculate the total sales amount from all orders.
        total_sales = self.session.query(sqlalchemy.func.sum(Order.total_amount)).scalar()
        return total_sales if total_sales else 0.0

    def close(self):
        self.session.close()

if __name__ == '__main__':

    db_manager = DatabaseManager(db_url)

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    last_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), unique=True, nullable=False)
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    address = Column(String(200))
    registration_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.now)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(500))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    category = Column(String(50))  # e.g., "Bike", "Part", "Accessory"
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'), nullable=False)
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.now)
    total_amount = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    status = Column(String(50), default="Pending")  # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date='{self.order_date}', total={self.total_amount})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'), nullable=False)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'), nullable=False)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price_per_unit = Column(Float, nullable=False)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"


class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = None

    def open_connection(self):
        self.session = self.Session()

    def close_connection(self):
        if self.session:
            self.session.close()
            self.session = None

    def add_customer(self, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number=None, address=None):
        """Adds a new customer to the database."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        new_customer = Customer(first_name=first_name, last_name=last_name, email=email,
                                phone_number=phone_number, address=address)
        self.session.add(new_customer)
        self.session.commit()
        return new_customer

    def get_customer_by_id(self, customer_id):
        """Retrieves a customer by their ID."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        return self.session.query(Customer).filter_by(id=customer_id).first()

    def get_customer_by_email(self, email):
        """Retrieves a customer by their email."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        return self.session.query(Customer).filter_by(email=email).first()

    def update_customer(self, customer_id, first_name=None, last_name=None, email=None, phone_number=None, address=None):
        """Updates customer information."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        customer = self.get_customer_by_id(customer_id)
        if customer:
            if first_name:
                customer.first_name = first_name
            if last_name:
                customer.last_name = last_name
            if email:
                customer.email = email
            if phone_number:
                customer.phone_number = phone_number
            if address:
                customer.address = address
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def delete_customer(self, customer_id):
        """Deletes a customer from the database."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        customer = self.get_customer_by_id(customer_id)
        if customer:
            self.session.delete(customer)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def add_product(self, name, description, price, category, stock_quantity):
        """Adds a new product to the database."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        new_product = Product(name=name, description=description, price=price,
                              category=category, stock_quantity=stock_quantity)
        self.session.add(new_product)
        self.session.commit()
        return new_product

    def get_product_by_id(self, product_id):
        """Retrieves a product by its ID."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        return self.session.query(Product).filter_by(id=product_id).first()

    def update_product(self, product_id, name=None, description=None, price=None, category=None, stock_quantity=None):
        """Updates product information."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        product = self.get_product_by_id(product_id)
        if product:
            if name:
                product.name = name
            if description:
                product.description = description
            if price:
                product.price = price
            if category:
                product.category = category
            if stock_quantity:
                product.stock_quantity = stock_quantity
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def delete_product(self, product_id):
        """Deletes a product from the database."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        product = self.get_product_by_id(product_id)
        if product:
            self.session.delete(product)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def create_order(self, customer_id, order_items):
        """Creates a new order."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")

        customer = self.get_customer_by_id(customer_id)
        if not customer:
            raise ValueError("Customer not found.")

        new_order = Order(customer_id=customer_id)
        total_amount = 0.0

        for product_id, quantity in order_items.items():
            product = self.get_product_by_id(product_id)
            if not product:
                raise ValueError(f"Product with ID {product_id} not found.")

            if product.stock_quantity < quantity:
                raise ValueError(f"Not enough stock for product {product.name}.")

            order_item = OrderItem(order=new_order, product=product, quantity=quantity, price_per_unit=product.price)
            self.session.add(order_item)
            total_amount += product.price * quantity
            product.stock_quantity -= quantity

        new_order.total_amount = total_amount
        self.session.add(new_order)
        self.session.commit()
        return new_order

    def get_order_by_id(self, order_id):
        """Retrieves an order by its ID."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        return self.session.query(Order).filter_by(id=order_id).first()

    def update_order_status(self, order_id, status):
        """Updates the status of an order."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        order = self.get_order_by_id(order_id)
        if order:
            order.status = status
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def filter_products(self, category=None, min_price=None, max_price=None):
        """Filters products based on criteria."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")

        query = self.session.query(Product)

        if category:
            query = query.filter(Product.category == category)
        if min_price:
            query = query.filter(Product.price >= min_price)
        if max_price:
            query = query.filter(Product.price <= max_price)

        return query.all()

    def lookup_products(self, search_term):
        """Looks up products based on a search term (name or description)."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")

        search_term = f"%{search_term}%"  # Add wildcards for LIKE operator
        products = self.session.query(Product).filter(
            sqlalchemy.or_(Product.name.like(search_term), Product.description.like(search_term))
        ).all()
        return products

if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Example Usage
    db_url = 'sqlite:///./cycle_shop.db'  # Use an in-memory database for testing

        # Add products

                raise ValueError(f"Not enough stock for product {product.name}.")

            unit_price = product.price
            order_item = OrderItem(order=new_order, product=product, quantity=quantity, unit_price=unit_price)
            new_order.order_items.append(order_item)
            total_amount += unit_price * quantity

            product.stock_quantity -= quantity
            self.session.add(product) # Update the product stock

        new_order.total_amount = total_amount
        self.session.add(new_order)
        self.session.commit()
        return new_order

    def get_order_by_id(self, order_id):
        """Retrieves an order by its ID."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")

        return self.session.query(Order).filter(Order.id == order_id).first()

    def update_order_status(self, order_id, status):
        """Updates the status of an order."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")

        order = self.get_order_by_id(order_id)
        if order:
            order.status = status
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def filter_products(self, category=None, min_price=None, max_price=None):
        """Filters products based on criteria."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")

        query = self.session.query(Product)

        if category:
            query = query.filter(Product.category == category)
        if min_price:
            query = query.filter(Product.price >= min_price)
        if max_price:
            query = query.filter(Product.price <= max_price)

        return query.all()

    def lookup_products(self, search_term):
        """Looks up products based on a search term (name or description)."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")

        search_term = f"%{search_term}%"  # Add wildcards for LIKE operator
        return self.session.query(Product).filter(
            sqlalchemy.or_(Product.name.like(search_term), Product.description.like(search_term))
        ).all()

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    last_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), unique=True, nullable=False)
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    address = Column(String(200))
    registration_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.now)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(500))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    category = Column(String(50))  # e.g., "Bike", "Part", "Accessory"
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price}, stock={self.stock_quantity})>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'), nullable=False)
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.now)
    total_amount = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    status = Column(String(50), default="Pending")  # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date='{self.order_date}', total={self.total_amount})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'), nullable=False)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'), nullable=False)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price_per_unit = Column(Float, nullable=False)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"


class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = None

    def open_connection(self):
        self.session = self.Session()

    def close_connection(self):
        if self.session:
            self.session.close()
            self.session = None

    def add_customer(self, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number=None, address=None):
        """Adds a new customer to the database."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        new_customer = Customer(first_name=first_name, last_name=last_name, email=email,
                                phone_number=phone_number, address=address)
        self.session.add(new_customer)
        self.session.commit()
        return new_customer

    def get_customer_by_id(self, customer_id):
        """Retrieves a customer by their ID."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        return self.session.query(Customer).filter_by(id=customer_id).first()

    def get_customer_by_email(self, email):
        """Retrieves a customer by their email."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        return self.session.query(Customer).filter_by(email=email).first()

    def update_customer(self, customer_id, first_name=None, last_name=None, email=None, phone_number=None, address=None):
        """Updates customer information."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        customer = self.get_customer_by_id(customer_id)
        if customer:
            if first_name:
                customer.first_name = first_name
            if last_name:
                customer.last_name = last_name
            if email:
                customer.email = email
            if phone_number:
                customer.phone_number = phone_number
            if address:
                customer.address = address
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def delete_customer(self, customer_id):
        """Deletes a customer from the database."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        customer = self.get_customer_by_id(customer_id)
        if customer:
            self.session.delete(customer)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def add_product(self, name, description, price, category, stock_quantity):
        """Adds a new product to the database."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        new_product = Product(name=name, description=description, price=price,
                              category=category, stock_quantity=stock_quantity)
        self.session.add(new_product)
        self.session.commit()
        return new_product

    def get_product_by_id(self, product_id):
        """Retrieves a product by its ID."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        return self.session.query(Product).filter_by(id=product_id).first()

    def update_product(self, product_id, name=None, description=None, price=None, category=None, stock_quantity=None):
        """Updates product information."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        product = self.get_product_by_id(product_id)
        if product:
            if name:
                product.name = name
            if description:
                product.description = description
            if price:
                product.price = price
            if category:
                product.category = category
            if stock_quantity:
                product.stock_quantity = stock_quantity
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def delete_product(self, product_id):
        """Deletes a product from the database."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        product = self.get_product_by_id(product_id)
        if product:
            self.session.delete(product)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def create_order(self, customer_id, order_items):
        """Creates a new order."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")

        customer = self.get_customer_by_id(customer_id)
        if not customer:
            raise ValueError("Customer not found.")

        new_order = Order(customer_id=customer_id)
        total_amount = 0.0

        for product_id, quantity in order_items.items():
            product = self.get_product_by_id(product_id)
            if not product:
                raise ValueError(f"Product with ID {product_id} not found.")

            if product.stock_quantity < quantity:
                raise ValueError(f"Not enough stock for product {product.name}.")

            order_item = OrderItem(order=new_order, product=product, quantity=quantity, price_per_unit=product.price)
            self.session.add(order_item)
            total_amount += product.price * quantity
            product.stock_quantity -= quantity

        new_order.total_amount = total_amount
        self.session.add(new_order)
        self.session.commit()
        return new_order

    def get_order_by_id(self, order_id):
        """Retrieves an order by its ID."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        return self.session.query(Order).filter_by(id=order_id).first()

    def update_order_status(self, order_id, status):
        """Updates the status of an order."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")
        order = self.get_order_by_id(order_id)
        if order:
            order.status = status
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def filter_products(self, category=None, min_price=None, max_price=None):
        """Filters products based on criteria."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")

        query = self.session.query(Product)

        if category:
            query = query.filter(Product.category == category)
        if min_price:
            query = query.filter(Product.price >= min_price)
        if max_price:
            query = query.filter(Product.price <= max_price)

        return query.all()

    def lookup_products(self, search_term):
        """Looks up products based on a search term (name or description)."""
        if not self.session:
            raise Exception("Database connection not open. Call open_connection() first.")

        search_term = f"%{search_term}%"  # Add wildcards for LIKE operator
        products = self.session.query(Product).filter(
            sqlalchemy.or_(Product.name.like(search_term), Product.description.like(search_term))
        ).all()
        return products

        # Create an order
        order_items = {product1.id: 1, product2.id: 2}  # Customer buys 1 bike and 2 helmets

        updated_order = db_manager.get_order_by_id(order1.id)
