    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, user_id={self.user_id}, total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    wheel_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('wheels.id'), nullable=True) # Allow null if it's an accessory
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True) # Allow null if it's a wheel
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    price = Column(Float) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="items")
    wheel = relationship("Wheel", back_populates="orders")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="orders")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"

class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = None

    def connect(self):
        self.session = self.Session()
        return self.session

    def close(self):
        if self.session:
            self.session.close()

    def add_wheel(self, name, description, price, size, material, tire_type, brand, quantity_in_stock, image_url):
        wheel = Wheel(name=name, description=description, price=price, size=size, material=material,
                      tire_type=tire_type, brand=brand, quantity_in_stock=quantity_in_stock, image_url=image_url)
        self.session.add(wheel)
        self.session.commit()
        return wheel

    def get_wheel_by_id(self, wheel_id):
        return self.session.query(Wheel).filter_by(id=wheel_id).first()

    def update_wheel(self, wheel_id, **kwargs):
        wheel = self.get_wheel_by_id(wheel_id)
        if wheel:
            for key, value in kwargs.items():
                setattr(wheel, key, value)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def delete_wheel(self, wheel_id):
        wheel = self.get_wheel_by_id(wheel_id)
        if wheel:
            self.session.delete(wheel)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def filter_wheels(self, **kwargs):
        query = self.session.query(Wheel)
        for key, value in kwargs.items():
            query = query.filter(getattr(Wheel, key) == value)
        return query.all()

    def search_wheels(self, search_term):
        return self.session.query(Wheel).filter(Wheel.name.like(f"%{search_term}%") | Wheel.description.like(f"%{search_term}%")).all()

    def add_accessory(self, name, description, price, type, brand, quantity_in_stock, image_url):
        accessory = Accessory(name=name, description=description, price=price, type=type, brand=brand,

        self.session.add(accessory)
        self.session.commit()
        return accessory

        return self.session.query(Accessory).filter_by(id=accessory_id).first()

    def update_accessory(self, accessory_id, **kwargs):

        if accessory:

            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def delete_accessory(self, accessory_id):

        if accessory:

            return True

    def filter_accessories(self, **kwargs):

        for key, value in kwargs.items():

    def get_user_by_id(self, user_id):

    def update_user(self, user_id, **kwargs):

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship, sessionmaker
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False, unique=True)
    description = Column(String(1000))

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    image_url = Column(String(255))
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'))
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")
    product_specifications = relationship("ProductSpecification", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class ProductSpecification(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'product_specifications'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'))
    specification_name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    specification_value = Column(String(255))

    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="product_specifications")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<ProductSpecification(name='{self.specification_name}', value='{self.specification_value}')>"

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String(255), nullable=False, unique=True)
    password = Column(String(255), nullable=False)  # In real-world, hash this!
    email = Column(String(255), unique=True)
    first_name = Column(String(255))
    last_name = Column(String(255))
    address = Column(String(255))
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    is_admin = Column(Boolean, default=False)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="user")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<User(username='{self.username}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'))
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.utcnow)
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    shipping_address = Column(String(255))
    order_status = Column(String(50), default="Pending") # e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, user_id={self.user_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price_per_item = Column(Float, nullable=False) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"


class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = self.Session()

    def add(self, item):
        self.session.add(item)
        self.session.commit()

    def delete(self, item):
        self.session.delete(item)
        self.session.commit()

    def update(self):
        self.session.commit()

    def get_by_id(self, model, item_id):
        return self.session.query(model).get(item_id)

    def get_all(self, model):
        return self.session.query(model).all()

    def search(self, model, search_term, *fields):
        """
        Searches for items in the database based on a search term across specified fields.

        Args:
            model: The SQLAlchemy model class to search within.
            search_term: The string to search for.
            *fields: Variable number of SQLAlchemy Column objects to search in.

        Returns:
            A list of model instances that match the search criteria.
        """
        search_results = []
        for field in fields:
            search_results.extend(self.session.query(model).filter(field.like(f"%{search_term}%")).all())
        return list(set(search_results))  # Remove duplicates

    def close(self):
        self.session.close()


if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Example Usage
    db_url = 'sqlite:///./bike_store.db'  # Use an in-memory database for testing
    db = DatabaseManager(db_url)

    # Create some categories
    category1 = Category(name="Bikes", description="Complete bicycles")
    category2 = Category(name="Components", description="Individual bike parts")
    category3 = Category(name="Accessories", description="Bike-related accessories")

    db.add(category1)
    db.add(category2)
    db.add(category3)

    # Create some products
    product1 = Product(name="Mountain Bike", description="Full suspension mountain bike", price=1500.00, category=category1, stock_quantity=10)
    product2 = Product(name="Shimano Derailleur", description="Rear derailleur", price=75.00, category=category2, stock_quantity=50)
    product3 = Product(name="Bike Helmet", description="Adult bike helmet", price=50.00, category=category3, stock_quantity=30)

    db.add(product1)
    db.add(product2)
    db.add(product3)

    # Add product specifications
    spec1 = ProductSpecification(product=product1, specification_name="Frame Material", specification_value="Aluminum")
    spec2 = ProductSpecification(product=product1, specification_name="Wheel Size", specification_value="29 inches")
    db.add(spec1)
    db.add(spec2)

    # Create a user
    user1 = User(username="johndoe", password="password123", email="john.doe@example.com", first_name="John", last_name="Doe")
    db.add(user1)

    # Create an order
    order1 = Order(user=user1, shipping_address="123 Main St")
    db.add(order1)

    # Create order items
    order_item1 = OrderItem(order=order1, product=product1, quantity=1, price_per_item=product1.price)
    order_item2 = OrderItem(order=order1, product=product3, quantity=2, price_per_item=product3.price)
    db.add(order_item1)
    db.add(order_item2)

    order1.total_amount = (order_item1.quantity * order_item1.price_per_item) + (order_item2.quantity * order_item2.price_per_item)
    db.update()

    # Example queries
    retrieved_product = db.get_by_id(Product, 1)
    print(f"Retrieved product: {retrieved_product}")

    all_categories = db.get_all(Category)
    print("All categories:")
    for category in all_categories:
        print(category)

    # Example search
    search_results = db.search(Product, "Bike", Product.name, Product.description)
    print("Search results for 'Bike':")
    for product in search_results:
        print(product)

    # Update stock quantity
    product1.stock_quantity = 8
    db.update()
    print(f"Updated stock quantity for {product1.name}: {product1.stock_quantity}")

    # Delete a product
    #db.delete(product3) # Be careful with deleting, especially with foreign key relationships

    db.close()

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(50), nullable=False, unique=True)
    description = Column(String(255))

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'))
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    last_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), nullable=False, unique=True)
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    address = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    is_shipped = Column(Boolean, default=False)

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    unit_price = Column(Float, nullable=False)

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"

class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = self.Session()

    def add_category(self, name, description=None):
        """Adds a new category to the database."""
        try:
            new_category = Category(name=name, description=description)
            self.session.add(new_category)
            self.session.commit()
            return new_category
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error adding category: {e}")
            return None

    def get_category_by_name(self, name):
        """Retrieves a category by its name."""
        return self.session.query(Category).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def update_category(self, category_id, new_name=None, new_description=None):
        """Updates a category's name and/or description."""
        try:
            category = self.session.query(Category).get(category_id)
            if category:
                if new_name:
                    category.name = new_name
                if new_description:
                    category.description = new_description
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Category not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating category: {e}")
            return False

    def delete_category(self, category_id):
        """Deletes a category from the database."""
        try:
            category = self.session.query(Category).get(category_id)
            if category:
                self.session.delete(category)
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Category not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error deleting category: {e}")
            return False

    def add_product(self, name, description, price, stock_quantity, category_name, image_url=None):
        """Adds a new product to the database."""
        try:
            category = self.get_category_by_name(category_name)
            if not category:
                print(f"Category '{category_name}' not found.")
                return None

            new_product = Product(
                name=name,
                description=description,
                price=price,
                stock_quantity=stock_quantity,
                category=category,
                image_url=image_url
            )
            self.session.add(new_product)
            self.session.commit()
            return new_product
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error adding product: {e}")
            return None

    def get_product_by_name(self, name):
        """Retrieves a product by its name."""
        return self.session.query(Product).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def update_product(self, product_id, new_name=None, new_description=None, new_price=None, new_stock_quantity=None, new_category_name=None, new_image_url=None):
        """Updates a product's details."""
        try:
            product = self.session.query(Product).get(product_id)
            if product:
                if new_name:
                    product.name = new_name
                if new_description:
                    product.description = new_description
                if new_price is not None:
                    product.price = new_price
                if new_stock_quantity is not None:
                    product.stock_quantity = new_stock_quantity
                if new_category_name:
                    new_category = self.get_category_by_name(new_category_name)
                    if new_category:
                        product.category = new_category
                    else:
                        print(f"Category '{new_category_name}' not found.")
                        return False
                if new_image_url:
                    product.image_url = new_image_url

                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Product not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating product: {e}")
            return False

    def delete_product(self, product_id):
        """Deletes a product from the database."""
        try:
            product = self.session.query(Product).get(product_id)
            if product:
                self.session.delete(product)
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Product not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error deleting product: {e}")
            return False

    def add_customer(self, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number=None, address=None):
        """Adds a new customer to the database."""
        try:
            new_customer = Customer(
                first_name=first_name,
                last_name=last_name,
                email=email,
                phone_number=phone_number,
                address=address
            )
            self.session.add(new_customer)
            self.session.commit()
            return new_customer
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error adding customer: {e}")
            return None

    def get_customer_by_email(self, email):
        """Retrieves a customer by their email."""
        return self.session.query(Customer).filter_by(email=email).first()

    def update_customer(self, customer_id, new_first_name=None, new_last_name=None, new_email=None, new_phone_number=None, new_address=None):
        """Updates a customer's details."""
        try:
            customer = self.session.query(Customer).get(customer_id)
            if customer:
                if new_first_name:
                    customer.first_name = new_first_name
                if new_last_name:
                    customer.last_name = new_last_name
                if new_email:
                    customer.email = new_email
                if new_phone_number:
                    customer.phone_number = new_phone_number
                if new_address:
                    customer.address = new_address

                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Customer not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating customer: {e}")
            return False

    def delete_customer(self, customer_id):
        """Deletes a customer from the database."""
        try:
            customer = self.session.query(Customer).get(customer_id)
            if customer:
                self.session.delete(customer)
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Customer not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error deleting customer: {e}")
            return False

    def create_order(self, customer_email, order_items):
        """Creates a new order for a customer."""
        try:
            customer = self.get_customer_by_email(customer_email)
            if not customer:
                print(f"Customer with email '{customer_email}' not found.")
                return None

            new_order = Order(customer=customer)
            total_amount = 0.0

            for item in order_items:
                product = self.session.query(Product).get(item['product_id'])
                if not product:
                    print(f"Product with ID '{item['product_id']}' not found.")
                    self.session.rollback()
                    return None

                quantity = item['quantity']
                unit_price = product.price
                total_amount += quantity * unit_price

                new_order_item = OrderItem(
                    order=new_order,
                    product=product,
                    quantity=quantity,
                    unit_price=unit_price
                )
                self.session.add(new_order_item)

                # Update stock quantity
                product.stock_quantity -= quantity
                if product.stock_quantity < 0:
                    print(f"Not enough stock for product '{product.name}'.")
                    self.session.rollback()
                    return None

            new_order.total_amount = total_amount
            self.session.add(new_order)
            self.session.commit()
            return new_order
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error creating order: {e}")
            return None

    def get_order(self, order_id):
        """Retrieves an order by its ID."""
        return self.session.query(Order).get(order_id)

    def update_order_status(self, order_id, is_shipped):
        """Updates the shipping status of an order."""
        try:
            order = self.session.query(Order).get(order_id)
            if order:
                order.is_shipped = is_shipped
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Order not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating order status: {e}")
            return False

    def search_products(self, query):
        """Searches for products based on a query string (name or description)."""
        return self.session.query(Product).filter(
            sqlalchemy.or_(
                Product.name.ilike(f"%{query}%"),
                Product.description.ilike(f"%{query}%")
            )
        ).all()

    def filter_products_by_category(self, category_name):
        """Filters products by category name."""
        category = self.get_category_by_name(category_name)
        if category:
            return category.products
        else:
            return []

    def close(self):
        """Closes the database session."""
        self.session.close()

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(50), nullable=False, unique=True)
    description = Column(String(255))

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'))
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    last_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), nullable=False, unique=True)
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    address = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(email='{self.email}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    status = Column(String(50), default='Pending') # e.g., Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price_per_unit = Column(Float, nullable=False)

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"

class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = self.Session()

    def create_database(self):
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)

    def add_category(self, name, description=None):
        category = Category(name=name, description=description)
        self.session.add(category)
        self.session.commit()
        return category

    def get_category_by_name(self, name):
        return self.session.query(Category).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def add_product(self, name, description, price, stock_quantity, category_name, image_url=None):
        category = self.get_category_by_name(category_name)
        if not category:
            raise ValueError(f"Category '{category_name}' not found.")

        product = Product(name=name, description=description, price=price,
                          stock_quantity=stock_quantity, category=category, image_url=image_url)
        self.session.add(product)
        self.session.commit()
        return product

    def get_product_by_name(self, name):
        return self.session.query(Product).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def update_product_stock(self, product_name, new_quantity):
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)
        if product:
            product.stock_quantity = new_quantity
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def delete_product(self, product_name):
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)
        if product:
            self.session.delete(product)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def search_products(self, search_term):
        return self.session.query(Product).filter(
            Product.name.contains(search_term) | Product.description.contains(search_term)
        ).all()

    def add_customer(self, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number=None, address=None):
        customer = Customer(first_name=first_name, last_name=last_name, email=email,
                            phone_number=phone_number, address=address)
        self.session.add(customer)
        self.session.commit()
        return customer

    def get_customer_by_email(self, email):
          return self.session.query(Customer).filter_by(email=email).first()

    def add_order(self, customer_email, order_date=None, total_amount=None, status='Pending'):
        customer = self.get_customer_by_email(customer_email)
        if not customer:
            raise ValueError(f"Customer with email '{customer_email}' not found.")

        order = Order(customer=customer, order_date=order_date, total_amount=total_amount, status=status)
        self.session.add(order)
        self.session.commit()
        return order

    def get_order_by_id(self, order_id):
        return self.session.query(Order).filter_by(id=order_id).first()

    def add_order_item(self, order_id, product_name, quantity, price_per_unit):
        order = self.get_order_by_id(order_id)
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)

        if not order:
            raise ValueError(f"Order with id '{order_id}' not found.")
        if not product:
            raise ValueError(f"Product '{product_name}' not found.")

        order_item = OrderItem(order=order, product=product, quantity=quantity, price_per_unit=price_per_unit)
        self.session.add(order_item)
        self.session.commit()
        return order_item

    def close(self):
        self.session.close()

if __name__ == '__main__':

    finally:
        db_manager.close()

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(50), nullable=False, unique=True)
    description = Column(String(255))

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'))
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    last_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), nullable=False, unique=True)
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    address = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    is_shipped = Column(Boolean, default=False)

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    unit_price = Column(Float, nullable=False)

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"

class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = self.Session()

    def add_category(self, name, description=None):
        """Adds a new category to the database."""
        try:
            new_category = Category(name=name, description=description)
            self.session.add(new_category)
            self.session.commit()
            return new_category
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error adding category: {e}")
            return None

    def get_category_by_name(self, name):
        """Retrieves a category by its name."""
        return self.session.query(Category).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def update_category(self, category_id, new_name=None, new_description=None):
        """Updates a category's name and/or description."""
        try:
            category = self.session.query(Category).get(category_id)
            if category:
                if new_name:
                    category.name = new_name
                if new_description:
                    category.description = new_description
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Category not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating category: {e}")
            return False

    def delete_category(self, category_id):
        """Deletes a category from the database."""
        try:
            category = self.session.query(Category).get(category_id)
            if category:
                self.session.delete(category)
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Category not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error deleting category: {e}")
            return False

    def add_product(self, name, description, price, stock_quantity, category_name, image_url=None):
        """Adds a new product to the database."""
        try:
            category = self.get_category_by_name(category_name)
            if not category:
                print(f"Category '{category_name}' not found.")
                return None

            new_product = Product(
                name=name,
                description=description,
                price=price,
                stock_quantity=stock_quantity,
                category=category,
                image_url=image_url
            )
            self.session.add(new_product)
            self.session.commit()
            return new_product
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error adding product: {e}")
            return None

    def get_product_by_name(self, name):
        """Retrieves a product by its name."""
        return self.session.query(Product).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def update_product(self, product_id, new_name=None, new_description=None, new_price=None, new_stock_quantity=None, new_category_name=None, new_image_url=None):
        """Updates a product's details."""
        try:
            product = self.session.query(Product).get(product_id)
            if product:
                if new_name:
                    product.name = new_name
                if new_description:
                    product.description = new_description
                if new_price is not None:
                    product.price = new_price
                if new_stock_quantity is not None:
                    product.stock_quantity = new_stock_quantity
                if new_category_name:
                    new_category = self.get_category_by_name(new_category_name)
                    if new_category:
                        product.category = new_category
                    else:
                        print(f"Category '{new_category_name}' not found.")
                        return False
                if new_image_url:
                    product.image_url = new_image_url

                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Product not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating product: {e}")
            return False

    def delete_product(self, product_id):
        """Deletes a product from the database."""
        try:
            product = self.session.query(Product).get(product_id)
            if product:
                self.session.delete(product)
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Product not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error deleting product: {e}")
            return False

    def add_customer(self, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number=None, address=None):
        """Adds a new customer to the database."""
        try:
            new_customer = Customer(
                first_name=first_name,
                last_name=last_name,
                email=email,
                phone_number=phone_number,
                address=address
            )
            self.session.add(new_customer)
            self.session.commit()
            return new_customer
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error adding customer: {e}")
            return None

    def get_customer_by_email(self, email):
        """Retrieves a customer by their email."""
        return self.session.query(Customer).filter_by(email=email).first()

    def update_customer(self, customer_id, new_first_name=None, new_last_name=None, new_email=None, new_phone_number=None, new_address=None):
        """Updates a customer's details."""
        try:
            customer = self.session.query(Customer).get(customer_id)
            if customer:
                if new_first_name:
                    customer.first_name = new_first_name
                if new_last_name:
                    customer.last_name = new_last_name
                if new_email:
                    customer.email = new_email
                if new_phone_number:
                    customer.phone_number = new_phone_number
                if new_address:
                    customer.address = new_address

                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Customer not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating customer: {e}")
            return False

    def delete_customer(self, customer_id):
        """Deletes a customer from the database."""
        try:
            customer = self.session.query(Customer).get(customer_id)
            if customer:
                self.session.delete(customer)
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Customer not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error deleting customer: {e}")
            return False

    def create_order(self, customer_email, order_items):
        """Creates a new order for a customer."""
        try:
            customer = self.get_customer_by_email(customer_email)
            if not customer:
                print(f"Customer with email '{customer_email}' not found.")
                return None

            new_order = Order(customer=customer)
            total_amount = 0.0

            for item in order_items:
                product = self.session.query(Product).get(item['product_id'])
                if not product:
                    print(f"Product with ID '{item['product_id']}' not found.")
                    self.session.rollback()
                    return None

                quantity = item['quantity']
                unit_price = product.price
                total_amount += quantity * unit_price

                new_order_item = OrderItem(
                    order=new_order,
                    product=product,
                    quantity=quantity,
                    unit_price=unit_price
                )
                self.session.add(new_order_item)

                # Update stock quantity
                product.stock_quantity -= quantity
                if product.stock_quantity < 0:
                    print(f"Not enough stock for product '{product.name}'.")
                    self.session.rollback()
                    return None

            new_order.total_amount = total_amount
            self.session.add(new_order)
            self.session.commit()
            return new_order
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error creating order: {e}")
            return None

    def get_order(self, order_id):
        """Retrieves an order by its ID."""
        return self.session.query(Order).get(order_id)

    def update_order_status(self, order_id, is_shipped):
        """Updates the shipping status of an order."""
        try:
            order = self.session.query(Order).get(order_id)
            if order:
                order.is_shipped = is_shipped
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Order not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating order status: {e}")
            return False

    def search_products(self, query):
        """Searches for products based on a query string (name or description)."""
        return self.session.query(Product).filter(
            sqlalchemy.or_(
                Product.name.ilike(f"%{query}%"),
                Product.description.ilike(f"%{query}%")
            )
        ).all()

    def filter_products_by_category(self, category_name):
        """Filters products by category name."""
        category = self.get_category_by_name(category_name)
        if category:
            return category.products
        else:
            return []

    def close(self):
        """Closes the database session."""
        self.session.close()

if __name__ == '__main__':

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(50), nullable=False, unique=True)
    description = Column(String(255))

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'))
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    last_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), nullable=False, unique=True)
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    address = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(email='{self.email}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    status = Column(String(50), default='Pending') # e.g., Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price_per_unit = Column(Float, nullable=False)

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"

class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = self.Session()

    def create_database(self):
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)

    def add_category(self, name, description=None):
        category = Category(name=name, description=description)
        self.session.add(category)
        self.session.commit()
        return category

    def get_category_by_name(self, name):
        return self.session.query(Category).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def add_product(self, name, description, price, stock_quantity, category_name, image_url=None):
        category = self.get_category_by_name(category_name)
        if not category:
            raise ValueError(f"Category '{category_name}' not found.")

        product = Product(name=name, description=description, price=price,
                          stock_quantity=stock_quantity, category=category, image_url=image_url)
        self.session.add(product)
        self.session.commit()
        return product

    def get_product_by_name(self, name):
        return self.session.query(Product).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def update_product_stock(self, product_name, new_quantity):
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)
        if product:
            product.stock_quantity = new_quantity
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def delete_product(self, product_name):
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)
        if product:
            self.session.delete(product)
            self.session.commit()
            return True
        return False

    def search_products(self, search_term):
        return self.session.query(Product).filter(
            Product.name.contains(search_term) | Product.description.contains(search_term)
        ).all()

    def add_customer(self, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number=None, address=None):
        customer = Customer(first_name=first_name, last_name=last_name, email=email,
                            phone_number=phone_number, address=address)
        self.session.add(customer)
        self.session.commit()
        return customer

    def get_customer_by_email(self, email):
          return self.session.query(Customer).filter_by(email=email).first()

    def add_order(self, customer_email, order_date=None, total_amount=None, status='Pending'):
        customer = self.get_customer_by_email(customer_email)
        if not customer:
            raise ValueError(f"Customer with email '{customer_email}' not found.")

        order = Order(customer=customer, order_date=order_date, total_amount=total_amount, status=status)
        self.session.add(order)
        self.session.commit()
        return order

    def get_order_by_id(self, order_id):
        return self.session.query(Order).filter_by(id=order_id).first()

    def add_order_item(self, order_id, product_name, quantity, price_per_unit):
        order = self.get_order_by_id(order_id)
        product = self.get_product_by_name(product_name)

        if not order:
            raise ValueError(f"Order with id '{order_id}' not found.")
        if not product:
            raise ValueError(f"Product '{product_name}' not found.")

        order_item = OrderItem(order=order, product=product, quantity=quantity, price_per_unit=price_per_unit)
        self.session.add(order_item)
        self.session.commit()
        return order_item

    def close(self):
        self.session.close()

if __name__ == '__main__':

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(50), nullable=False, unique=True)
    description = Column(String(255))

    products = relationship("Product", back_populates="category")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Category(name='{self.name}')>"

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(255))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'))
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    category = relationship("Category", back_populates="products")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="product")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Product(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"

class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    last_name = Column(String(50), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(100), nullable=False, unique=True)
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    address = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}')>"

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    is_shipped = Column(Boolean, default=False)

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, total_amount={self.total_amount})>"

class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    unit_price = Column(Float, nullable=False)

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    product = relationship("Product", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, product_id={self.product_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"

class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = self.Session()

    def add_category(self, name, description=None):
        """Adds a new category to the database."""
        try:
            new_category = Category(name=name, description=description)
            self.session.add(new_category)
            self.session.commit()
            return new_category
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error adding category: {e}")
            return None

    def get_category_by_name(self, name):
        """Retrieves a category by its name."""
        return self.session.query(Category).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def update_category(self, category_id, new_name=None, new_description=None):
        """Updates a category's name and/or description."""
        try:
            category = self.session.query(Category).get(category_id)
            if category:
                if new_name:
                    category.name = new_name
                if new_description:
                    category.description = new_description
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Category not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating category: {e}")
            return False

    def delete_category(self, category_id):
        """Deletes a category from the database."""
        try:
            category = self.session.query(Category).get(category_id)
            if category:
                self.session.delete(category)
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Category not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error deleting category: {e}")
            return False

    def add_product(self, name, description, price, stock_quantity, category_name, image_url=None):
        """Adds a new product to the database."""
        try:
            category = self.get_category_by_name(category_name)
            if not category:
                print(f"Category '{category_name}' not found.")
                return None

            new_product = Product(
                name=name,
                description=description,
                price=price,
                stock_quantity=stock_quantity,
                category=category,
                image_url=image_url
            )
            self.session.add(new_product)
            self.session.commit()
            return new_product
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error adding product: {e}")
            return None

    def get_product_by_name(self, name):
        """Retrieves a product by its name."""
        return self.session.query(Product).filter_by(name=name).first()

    def update_product(self, product_id, new_name=None, new_description=None, new_price=None, new_stock_quantity=None, new_category_name=None, new_image_url=None):
        """Updates a product's details."""
        try:
            product = self.session.query(Product).get(product_id)
            if product:
                if new_name:
                    product.name = new_name
                if new_description:
                    product.description = new_description
                if new_price is not None:
                    product.price = new_price
                if new_stock_quantity is not None:
                    product.stock_quantity = new_stock_quantity
                if new_category_name:
                    new_category = self.get_category_by_name(new_category_name)
                    if new_category:
                        product.category = new_category
                    else:
                        print(f"Category '{new_category_name}' not found.")
                        return False
                if new_image_url:
                    product.image_url = new_image_url

                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Product not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating product: {e}")
            return False

    def delete_product(self, product_id):
        """Deletes a product from the database."""
        try:
            product = self.session.query(Product).get(product_id)
            if product:
                self.session.delete(product)
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Product not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error deleting product: {e}")
            return False

    def add_customer(self, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number=None, address=None):
        """Adds a new customer to the database."""
        try:
            new_customer = Customer(
                first_name=first_name,
                last_name=last_name,
                email=email,
                phone_number=phone_number,
                address=address
            )
            self.session.add(new_customer)
            self.session.commit()
            return new_customer
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error adding customer: {e}")
            return None

    def get_customer_by_email(self, email):
        """Retrieves a customer by their email."""
        return self.session.query(Customer).filter_by(email=email).first()

    def update_customer(self, customer_id, new_first_name=None, new_last_name=None, new_email=None, new_phone_number=None, new_address=None):
        """Updates a customer's details."""
        try:
            customer = self.session.query(Customer).get(customer_id)
            if customer:
                if new_first_name:
                    customer.first_name = new_first_name
                if new_last_name:
                    customer.last_name = new_last_name
                if new_email:
                    customer.email = new_email
                if new_phone_number:
                    customer.phone_number = new_phone_number
                if new_address:
                    customer.address = new_address

                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Customer not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating customer: {e}")
            return False

    def delete_customer(self, customer_id):
        """Deletes a customer from the database."""
        try:
            customer = self.session.query(Customer).get(customer_id)
            if customer:
                self.session.delete(customer)
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Customer not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error deleting customer: {e}")
            return False

    def create_order(self, customer_email, order_items):
        """Creates a new order for a customer."""
        try:
            customer = self.get_customer_by_email(customer_email)
            if not customer:
                print(f"Customer with email '{customer_email}' not found.")
                return None

            new_order = Order(customer=customer)
            total_amount = 0.0

            for item in order_items:
                product = self.session.query(Product).get(item['product_id'])
                if not product:
                    print(f"Product with ID '{item['product_id']}' not found.")
                    self.session.rollback()
                    return None

                quantity = item['quantity']
                unit_price = product.price
                total_amount += quantity * unit_price

                new_order_item = OrderItem(
                    order=new_order,
                    product=product,
                    quantity=quantity,
                    unit_price=unit_price
                )
                self.session.add(new_order_item)

                # Update stock quantity
                product.stock_quantity -= quantity
                if product.stock_quantity < 0:
                    print(f"Not enough stock for product '{product.name}'.")
                    self.session.rollback()
                    return None

            new_order.total_amount = total_amount
            self.session.add(new_order)
            self.session.commit()
            return new_order
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error creating order: {e}")
            return None

    def get_order(self, order_id):
        """Retrieves an order by its ID."""
        return self.session.query(Order).get(order_id)

    def update_order_status(self, order_id, is_shipped):
        """Updates the shipping status of an order."""
        try:
            order = self.session.query(Order).get(order_id)
            if order:
                order.is_shipped = is_shipped
                self.session.commit()
                return True
            else:
                return False  # Order not found
        except Exception as e:
            self.session.rollback()
            print(f"Error updating order status: {e}")
            return False

    def search_products(self, query):
        """Searches for products based on a query string (name or description)."""
        return self.session.query(Product).filter(
            sqlalchemy.or_(
                Product.name.ilike(f"%{query}%"),
                Product.description.ilike(f"%{query}%")
            )
        ).all()

    def filter_products_by_category(self, category_name):
        """Filters products by category name."""
        category = self.get_category_by_name(category_name)
        if category:
            return category.products
        else:
            return []

    def close(self):
        """Closes the database session."""
        self.session.close()

if __name__ == '__main__':

            )

            if customer1:

                    # Example of updating a product

        else:
